Filling the screen a boy's face is revealed. ssodajineun haessal arae, malgeun nunbicyi aineun kamera jeongmyeoneul eungsihago issda. Under pouring sunlight, the boy with clear eyes stares straight into the camera. aineun koseumoseu wie anjaissneun jamjarireul hyanghae salmyeosi soneul bbeodneunda. The boy softly extends [his] hand towards the dragonfly sitting atop the cosmos. hwig~ jamjariga nalaga beorimyeon ... ggeuteobsi pyeolcyeojin gaeul nongwa pureun haneuli boinda. Whiz~ when the dragonfly flies away ... endlessly stretched out autumn rice fields and blue sky come into view. eoryeompusi deulryeooneun gigyesorie aiga gogaereul dolrimyeon, jeo meolri gyeongungi han daega oneun geosi boinda. When the boy turns his head sideways at the faintly approaching sound of machinery, there from afar a tractor is seen approaching. jeomjeom keojineun soriwa hamgge, gyeongungireul unjeonhaneun noinnewa dwiskane olra tan han namjayi moseubi boinda. As noise grows louder, a man who has managed to hop on the backseat behind the old man driving the tractor comes into view. seupoceu meorie geondalgateun insangeul punggineun 30dae namja ... hyeongsa bagdumanida. A 30-something man with sporty hair who gives off the vibe of a lowlife ... it is Detective PARK DOO-MAHN. gyeongungireul seun noineun sorireul ggwaeg jilreo aireul jjojabeoriryeo hajiman, aineun aranggos anhneunda. Old man stops the tractor and tries to whoosh the boy away by hollering howls, but the boy does not even shrug.

Park Doo-mahn takes out a tiny flashlight and points the light at the woman's face. <TRANSLATOR'S NOTE> Director BONG's intention is to show how "primitive" the South Korean police were in the 1980s. No police lines. No CSI Miami. Just drop by and take a look at the dead body, will you? That's how "amateurish" the South Korean police were back then (now they're really good, almost too good).

Flies and ants crawl across her cheek, and vomit streaming from her mouth with bloodstains in the mix are visible as well. yeojeonhi pyeonghwaroun saesoriwa haessalarae haneulgeorineun koseumoseudeul. Still peacefully do birds chirp and under the rays of sunlight, the cosmos sway. mudeomdeomhi boyeojineun jeolmeun yeoja bagbohyiyi siceneun mweonga saenggyeonghan neuggimmajeo junda. The young woman's cadaver belonging to PARK BO-HEE that appears calmly even emits an eerie feeling.

Park Doo-mahn meets eye-to-eye with the dead body of the woman, who died with half-closed eyes, with a peculiar expression. Director Bong intentionally uses the same expression ("died with half-closed eyes") to describe the woman. Park Doo-mahn is played by SONG GANG-HO, the "Tom Hanks" of South Korea. He'd know what to do with a stage direction like "meet eye-toeye with a peculiar expression." seoroyi siseoneul majcudeus, handongan deulyeoda bonda. As if trying to match each other's gaze, he looks on for a while. dumanyi gogaedo sicewa ddoggati yeopeuro gyauddunghaejinda. Doo-mahn's head tilts sideways like that of the dead body. meon balciseo dumaneul bogo issdeon aideulyi gogaedo jeojeolro ddara giunda. 'jiral' (jiral) = Korean slang meaning 'epilepsy-causing nonsense.' 'jiral' is shorthand for 'jiral-byung' (epilepsy), where 'byung' = disease. Doo-mahn is mocking the absurdity of the coroner's falling down -- seemingly unaware that he too had tumbled down at the same spot.

yuyeonhan momnolrimeuro naengtang sogeul heeomcineun duman. oganeun namjadeulyi geu bubuneul gyesog yeosbonda. ddeugeoun mul soge issneunge anindedo gyesog ibeseo eo-eu- sorireul naeneun duman.
S# 41. sacangga (naebu)

paentiman geolcin cae nuweoissneun yonggu, dambaereul piweo mulgo issda. ki jageun yunragnyeoga yongguyi oreunbaleul heobeogji wie olryeonohgo jeongseongseure jumulreo jugo yeoja : teoli eomceong manhaseo, wanjeon weonsungi gateun nomeun hanbeon bwassneunde.... yonggu : ddan yaedeul hantedu niga jom muleobwara? alassji? yeoja : eonnideul butjabguseo 'jeogi eonni...teol eobsneun saeggirang haebwasseoyo yonggu : geurae imma..... jal doemyeon obbaga neo os sajunda. yeoja : jinjja? (deo yeolsimhi soneul umjiginda.) yeojaneun gwageoe massajina anmaileul haesseossneunji, balbadag jumureuneun somssiga hyeonranhada.
S# 42. bangsonggug naebu.
radio bangsong seutyudio, ADjjeum dwae boineun ki jageun namjawa taeyuni iyagi jungida. yuricang neomeoro malsorin deulriji anhgo, mweonga janddeug jjajeungnan pyojeongyi taeyun.
S# 43. nanjido sseuregi maeribjang.

bangsonggugeseo ssoda buun sseuregi deomi.... yeobseodeulyi banisangeun imi sikeomeohge bultago issda. sonsugeoneuro kowa ibeul mageun taeyun, imi nangpaegame ilgeureojin eolgulida. meolri sseuregi deomieseo taoreuneun sikeomeon yeongi gidungi boinda. bijobeun yeogwanbang. nalgeun cimdaee geolteoanja yangmaleul beosgo issneun duman. seolyeong :(os beoseumyeo) eolgul jinjja bboyahne. duman : maldo mara...sali tungtung bbunda. bbuleo. seolyeong : teol eobsneun nom cajgin cajasseo? duman : cajgin gaebbuli cajeo? saunabiman wangcang ggaejyeossji. geugeo yeongsujeung ceorido seolyeong : eolgul hayaejineun geon johne( yeope anja dumanyi bbyameul seuljjeog manjyeobonda.) duman : johgineun nimi, ceoeum han dubeoniji... harujongil os ibeossda beoseossda, ibeossda beoseossda.. ddaemiri nomhante 'teoleobsneun namja bogeodeun nahante yeonragjusyo' geureomyeonseo jeonhwabeonho ddag i saeggiga nal yariggurihan nun biceuru bomyeonseo ssi-ig useoyo, cam na.... seolyeong : honja gosaenghaji malgu ddan aedeuldu jom sikyeo. seotaeyuninga? geu seoulseo wassdaneun duman : geu saeggin mojjareuteu jabeureo danyeo.
seolyeong : (hwangdanghan deus) mweo? duman : bbolbbugang amadeuseu mocareuteu....ssiba.....

ibul sogeuro nuumyeo dumanege deungeul naemineun seolyeong, dumanyi igsughan soni seolyeongyi seolyeong : seotaeyuninga gyaen yosaedu geureohge heossoriman hanabwa... duman : hagin...isanghagin jinjja isanghae...(beuraejieoreul sone deulgo mulggeureomi

duman : ani...beominmalya. sinmun bangsongeseo ireohge nanrireul cigu. nongile jeongyeongdeulggaji ireon madange ireohge ddo gyeo nawaseo yeojal jugiji? seolyeong : .....geureonigga micin nomiji. duman : micin nom eolgulina bwasseumyeon johgessda. eoddeohge saenggyeo meogeun eolgulinji..... seolyeong : nae eolgulina han beon jom cyeodabwara( duman eolguleul jagijjogeuro dolrimyeo saljjag
seolyeong : jeong dabdabhamyeon jeomjiberadu hanbeon gabwa, hogsi aleo? duman : jeom jibe? seolyeong : geurae. yonghadaneun jibe gaseo hanbeon muleobwa. beomini eodissneunji.......
S# 45. mudangjib / naj

daenajindedo eoducimcimhan mudangjib naebu. mudangeun nuneul gameun cae mweongae jibjunghanda. mudangyi nuncireul hilggeum bodeoni, manweonjjari seogjangeul seulgeumeoni sangwiro olryeonohneun duman. mudang : nun api heurin ge...amugeos du an boinda. duman, manweonjjari myeoc jangeul deo ggeonaeja.
mudang : geunom eolguli boinda... geunom pimudeun eolguli boinda.

duman : eoddeohge saenggyeossnayo? daedab eobsi nunman seulmyeosi ddeuneun mudang. hyinjaga beondeugineun keodaran nunaleun gigoehan neuggimeul jamsi nuncireul bodaga mudangege mweongareul naemineun duman. daieorie buteoissneun yongyijadeul duman : i eolguldeul junge hogsi... geu nomi issseubnigga? dumanyi daieorireul hwig bangbadageuro deonjyeo beorineun mudang, hwareul naemyeo.... mudang : jaesueobsge ! eodiseo jabgeosdeul sajineul dimileo?
mudang : (naengsureul deulikimyeo) naega sikineundaero haebwa. S# 46. sol bat/ bam

remikon gongjang bugeunyi solbat....bagmyeongja sageon hyeonjang jumeonieseo goi jeobeun canghojireul ggeonaeneun duman, sicega balgyeondoen jijeome josimseure pyeolcyeo gganda. mudangi jun geosin deus, canghoji han guseogeneun bujeogi jjighyeoissda. geu canghoji wiro sabaleul hana josimseure naeryeonohneun yonggu, sabaleneun meogmuli calrangcalrang sicega naon jijeomyi heulgeul han ungkeum peoseo meogmul soge puleo neohneun duman naranhi seon dumangwa yongguneun jesassange hadeus yeonieo keun jeoleul handa. ggalassdeon canghojireul dunggeulge gugyeoseo heulg seoggin meogmule salmyeosi damgweossda bbaeneun duman. yonggu : ....igeo jinjja doeneun geoyeyo? duman : siggeureo imma! i bujeogman haedo ige eolmajjarin jul aleo? duman :(canghoji josimseure pyeomyeo) igeol pyeoseo jal malrimyeon imma... yeogi beominyi eolgul hyeongsangi doegajigo...sag ddeooreunda i maliya. meogmuli ggeomeohge seumyeodeun bubuneul mulggeureomi baraboneun dusaram. sungan dwireul dolaboneun yonggu :(meolri non jjogeul bomyeo) eo ! .....mweoji? dolaboneun duman... jeojjog pyeon nongileseobuteo geomeun geurimja hanaga ijjogeuro ogo issda. sabal deungeul caenggyeo jaebssage solgajideomi dwiro momeul sumgineun dumangwa yonggu. duman :(sumeoseo barabodaga) ...alji? ...beomineun ggog sageonhyeonjange dasi onda...

jeomjeom deo sol bat jjogeuro dagaoneun hannamjayi geurimja. ajigdo dulreocyeojyeo issneun <jeobgeungeumji> raineul neomeo sageon jangsoro deuleooneun hannamja. dambae buleul butineun sungan jamsi deureonaneun namjayi eolguleun seotaeyunida. maegi tag pulrineun duman :(sogeundaedeus) ...mweoya jeo saeggi? dambaeyeongireul masimyeo sageonjangsoe jjogeuryeo anjeun taeyun, sohyeongkaseteureul ggeonaedeoni seuwicireul jogeuman soriro heulreonaoneun <mojjareuteu rekwiem 1beon>.. eodumsogeseo eumageul deuleumyeo saenggage jamgin taeyun. duman : micin saeggi.... ggolgabs ddeolgu issne... yonggu : geuraedu mweonga....pomeun naneundeyo.
sungan, kaseteu seuwicireul tug ggeuneun taeyun....jeo meolri non giljjoge saram geurimjaga

al su eobsneun goenamja hanaga jogeuman huraeswireul sone deun cae ijjogeuro ogo issda. jamsi danghwanghadaga, dumangwa yongguga sumeoissneun jjog bandaepyeon jabmogdeul dwiro sumneun taeyun. dagaoneun goenamjayi eolguleun eodume mudhyeo anboigo, geuga hwidureuneun huraeswi bulbicmani beonjjeoginda.
jwauro hyeongsadeuli sumeoseo jikyeo boneun geoseun ggumedo moreuncae.

bagmyeongjayi sicega balgyeondoen jijeome meomcweoseoneun goenamja, huraeswireul ibe mulgo baji jakeureul huraeswi bulbice boineun goenamjayi sogos...reiseu dalrin bunhongsaeg yeoja paentiida. eoieobsneun...geureona ginjangdoen eolgulro baraboneun dumangwa yonggu. geurigo bandaepyeonyi taeyun. goenamjaneun paenti majyeo seug naerideoni...sonamue gidaen cae maseuteo beisyeoneul sijaghanda. sineumsorireul baetneun goenamja. sonnolrimi gyeoghaejime ddara ibe mun huraeswi bulbicdo jeomjeom deo mweonga gameul jabeun pyojeongyi taeyun, josimseure goenamjareul deopcil gihoereul salpidaga... sungan bbajig-namusgaji bureojineun sorireul naego manda. umjjilhaneun taeyun. soneul meomcuneun goenamja, hwadeuljjag nolramyeo jyuwireul dolabonda... goyohan jeongjeog... gabjagseureon ingiceoge ddalddaliyi gamheungi dalanan goenamja, seulgeumeoni yeojapaentiwa bajireul geu sungan, warag ddwicyeonawa goenamjareul hyanghae deopcineun taeyun! geureona mujagjeong hwidureun goenamjayi palggumcie geudaero eolgul hanbogpaneul gangtadanghanda. hwiceong-hamyeo dasi bangyeogeul gaharyeodeon taeyun, goenamjayi eoseolpeun balgiljile jeongtongeuro naga ddeoleojinda. jeongsineobsi dalananeun goenamja...geuwa dongsie beongaeceoreom twieonaoneun dumangwa yonggu. kopi daggeumyeo ileonaryeodeon taeyun, gabjagseure twieonaon dulyi moseube eoribeongbeonghaejinda. duman :(dalrimyeo, taeyuneul hyanghae) ...byeongsin !(mweongareul hwig deonjyeojunda.) taeyunape tug ddeoleojineun keurinegseu 'bbobneun hyuji'..... sseudeon hyujida. malrabuteun gyeoul non wiro micin deusi dalananeun goenamja. jeonryeog jiljuro ddaraganeun dumangwa hyujireul umkyeojwin cae, kopireul daggeumyeo jeongsineobsi ddaraganeun taeyun. nongileul garojilreo maeul jjogeuro jeonryeogjiljuhaneun goenamja. bali ggwae bbareuda.
S# 47. maeul gil- jibdeul.

dadagdadag buteun maeul jibdeul sai jobeun gilro micin deus dalryeoganeun goenamja. meongmeong jijeodaeneun dongne gaedeulyi soriga jeomjeom manha jimyeo yoranhage bamhaneuleul dwiheundeunda. kopireul jiljil heulrimyeo dwiddaraganeun taeyun, gileul garojilreo goenamjareul ddara jababol jireumgil ceoreom boineun jobeun golmogeuro ggeoggeojyeo dalryeoganda.
geureona, yioero bogjabhan dongne gile igsugji moshae, banghyangeul ilhgo hesgalrigi sijaghaneun
hal su eobsi nonggadeul dameul neomeo, madangeul garo jilreo magu dalrinda. bamneujge madangeseo eommawa bbalrae neoldeon yeojungsaeng sohyeon, madang garojireuneun taeyuneul bogo ggamjjag nolranda.
S# 48. golmoggil - gongsajang. miroceoreom yorijori ggobuldaeneun golmoggileul jaldo dalananeun goenamja.
eoneusae maeuleul beoseona gosoggugdo araero nan guldarireul gwantonghae ddwieoganda. gyesog ddaraganeun dumangwa yonggu, jobgo gin guldarireul gwantonghae naoja...
gabjagi daenajceoreom hwanhanjomyeongarae.....buldojeo pokeureindeungi oganeun ungjanghan gongsahyeonjang.
gabjagi byeolceonjiga pyeolcyeojin deus, eoridungjeolhan dumangwa yonggu.

<gongsa ibaegpeuro jogi dalseong! wangong D-34il> ddawiyi guhoga jeoghin peulraekadeu araero. subaegmyeong inbudeuli yeogijeogi heuteojyeo godoen bamnodongeul hago issda. inbudeul teum eodingaro seulmyeosi pamudhyeossneunji. moseubi boiji anhneun goenamja. danghwangseure isaram jeosaram saireul hejibneun dumangwa yonggu. inbudeuleul hanahana ddeudeobojiman dadeul biseushan insange corahan oscarim. dumanyi sijeomeuro boyeojineun...nogada insaengdeulyi gulgogjin eolgul...eolguldeul........ sungan gongsajang humijin jjogeseo ilhaneun han inbuege dumanyi siseoni ggojhineunde... inbuga sabjileul hamyeo heorireul sugin sunja, beoleojin baji teumeuro ggocbunhong yeojapaenti reiseuga saljjag boinda! goenamjareul wanjeonhi alacarin duman, cimcaghage hoheubeul gadadeumneunda. sumeul halddagimyeo geujeseoya ddaraon taeyun, kopireul daggeumyeo gongsajang aneuro deuleoonda. yonggu : ne! duman : (guseog jjog garikimyeo) amuraedo ijjog gatda.... yaenedeulman hante jom moabwa. yonggu, gyeongcal sinbunjeungeul naeboimyeo guseogjjog inbudeul 6-7myeongeul geocilge molaseunda. yonggu ; dangsindeul....i jjog balgeundero jom nawabwa! ilhadeon sabgwa goggwaengi deungeul naeryeonohgo eoridungjeol...ilryeol hoengdaero neuleoseoneun inbudeul yonggu : dangsindeul, ijunge seoro jal moreuneun nom iss.... duman : jamggan !(yonggu jejihamyeo) naega bomyeon aleo..... inbudeulege dagaseoneun duman, geureolssahan pomeul jabeumyeo inbudeul eolguleul hanahana ddogbaro duman : eolgul ddogbarodeul deuleobwa.... dwieseo baraboneun taeyunyi siseoneul yisighamyeo, jwaeseo uro inbudeulyi eolguleul hanahana hulteo nagadeon duman, macimnae goenamjayi ape meorie heulgdo mudhigo geureol deus hage wijangeul haessjiman, imi modeungeol algo issneun bagduman. goenamjayi eolguleul salmyeosi umkyeojwinda. duman : nae nuneun jeoldae mos sogyeo... goenamja : ..... duman : nae nun ddogbaro bwa...... dumani sainman bonaegireul gidarineun yonggu, paengpaenghan gomujulceoreom dangjang twinggyeo nagal seuseurodo ssyoe molibhan deus, mweonga pomnaneun pyojeongeul yeonculhaneun duman. macimnae yonggujjogeul dolabomyeo... songarageuro 'i namjada' ssaineul bonaenda! geuwa dongsie, beongaeceoreom nalaga weokeobaleul nalryeobeorineun joyonggu. geudaero nadwingguneun goenamja. yongguga dalgyeodeuleo bajireul hwag beosgyeobomyeon ggocbunhong yeojapaentiga yonggu : okebari ! taeyun :.....! (eungeunhi nolraneun pyojeong)
S# 49. gangryeogban samusil.

duman majeunpyeone eoridungjeolhan moseubeuro anja issneun goenamja.....30dae hubane dogteughan byeongsun : ani....ddalddali jom cinge museun joebnigga? duman : joe aniji. geureom domangeun wae cisyeosseo? byeongsun : a geugeoya...obamjunge supeseo nuga tug twieonaonigga....geobdu hwag duman : (giga can deus) geureoge i ajeossiya...wae jibguseog nwadugu geogil gaseo geugeol byeongsun : a...jibeya yaedeuldo issgo...supsogi gonggido johgo..... duman : (beoreog) niga jugin yeoja saenggagi naseo dasi gangeoanya imma! geureohji?
S# 50. heoreumhan nongga /jobyeongsunyi jib.

jobyeongsunyi jib yeogijeogireul magu dwijigo issneun yongguwa sungyeongdeul. yeoreo gaji soseolcaegdeuli yioero manhgo, guseogen kases teipeudeul...keulraesigeun eobsgo daebubun cansongga teipida. miira gateun molgolyi jobyeongsun anae,
gansinhi byeoge gidae anja gyeongcaldeuleul barabonda. beojimtuseongi namjaae dumyeongeun jaemissneun deus gyesog sungyeongdeuleul ddara danidaga....

keunae : ajeossi igeo bosilraeyo? keunae : jaemissneungeo da yeogissneunde..... aireul ddara guseogbangeuro ganeun yonggu, aiga guseogbang ssaltong sogeul seug yeoleo jeggyeo ssaltong aneneun ssal daesin yeojadeul sogosi gadeughada. saegsaeggaji beuraejieo, geodeul, sonyeoyong paentideulggaji.... geu sogeseo dosaegjabjido naogo....jabji teumeneun oryeojin sinmungisadeuli ggiweojyeo issda.
S# 51. jiha cwijosil ap

byeongsuni sujibhan sinmungisareul banjangege naemineun duman, 'hwaseongyeonswae salinsageon' gwanryeon ibeone jugeun bagmyeongja yeoinyi sajini silrin gisado oryeojyeo issda. duman : sinmune donggeuldonggeulhan jagugdeul boisijyo?
duman : jeongaeg banguldeul.

eolgule bancanggoreul butin pae, banjang eoggaeneomeoro sinmundeuleul baraboneun taeyun. byeongsun : jega i jibsaramgwa geugeol hal suga eobsseubnida. megsiko ceongsonyeoncuggu 4gangjincul ddae... geuddae hanbeon buinirang han geosi ...gajang majimagin geolro gieogdoego issseubnida. duman : geuraeseo yosaen maennal soneuro handa? ireon jabjideul bomyeonseo? byeongsun : geunde .....yojeumeun malijyo, geuddan jabjideul bodado uridongne silje sageondeuli deo ige mweoralgga.....i sageongisadeuleul jasehi bomyeonseo maliji....sangsangyi naraereul
S# 53. cwijosil bagg

yeoja paentiman ibeun cae jolgo issneun byeongsuneul cwijosil jogeuman cangbaggeseo deulyeodaboneun dumangwa duman : myeoc nyeon jeonggaji seoulseo jangsareul hadaga wanjeonhi manghaeseo, teureogunjeon, gongsajang da haessseubnida. geureoda cinceogi haneun i dongne remikon gongjange jariga naseo, jagnyeonbuteo banjang : jeongwaneun ? duman : eobseoyo. jumindeul malroneun apeun buin byeongganho haejugo, gyohoe ggobagggobag nagago....cingcan ilsaegindeyo. duman : weonrae i byeontaedeuli geoteurun deo meoljjeonghaeyo. hajiman naenuneun mos sogiji..... yonggu : geuraeseo bagseonbaega du nune himeul ddag jugo, nogadadeul eolguleul hanahana bodeura geureodaga geu byeontaenom eolguleul dda-ag boguseoneun, han kyue pag jipeonaeneunde......wa..... geu sungan nayi weokeoga heogongeul gareumyeonseo....
sone deun keopiggaji culreonggeorimyeo, dongryo hyeongsadeul apeseo muyongdameul neuleonohneun joyonggu.
geu neomeo dwispyeoneuro, byeogeul bogo paegsange anja issneun taeyunyi ggubujeonghan moseub boinda. kopiga jagguman dasi naneunji, dumani jun keurinegseu pyujireul jjajeungseureobge tugtug bbobneun
S#55. gyeongcalseo ap / acim

gyeongcalseo jeongmun ape janddeug molryeodeun sindodeuli <geuriseudoyi sungyeolhan adeul, jobyeongsun hyeongjereul peulraekadeureul deulgo, jibsayi jihwiarae mognopyeo cansonggareul bulreodaego issda. geu teumeul uagseureobge ddulhgo deuleooneun banjang, jibsaga banjangyi eoggaee budijhyeo hwiceonghanda.
bbareuge geoleoganeun banjang yeopeuro (ssin17yi) gijaga jaebbareuge dalra butneunda.

banjang : (beoreog) mweo ddo! gija : (hwangdanghan deus umjjil) ....jeogiyo...jobyeongsuni bamsae jabaegeul haessdamyeonseoyo? banjang : nuga geurae? gija : jeongsig balpyoneun eonjejjeum hal geobnigga? banjang : hwagsilhangeo naolddaeggaji jom gidulryeobwayo. ajig moreundanigga..... gija : jigeum yeongjangeobsi josa naheuljjae anibnigga? bulbeobgugeumirago maldeuli manheundeyo.
gijaga jamsi eoribeobeo....sinbalggeuneul muggneunsai, hwig- banghyangeul teuleo sarajyeo beorineun
S# 56. cwijosil.

araeeneun yeojapaenti, wieneun nambangeul geolcin isanghan molgolyi jobyeongsun. myeociljjae jaman jaeugi gomuneul danghaessneunji jeongsini honmihan deus... maci sule janddeug cwihan duman : ja, jigeumbuteon aju jasehi ganeungeoya ! algesseo? byeongsun : jasehage! johseumda... ja, jega jibeseo naon dwie...geogiseo buteojyo. duman : eolssigu...joha geurae. soseolceoreom jasehage haebwa. (nogeumgi REC beoteuneul byeongsun : ja....ildan bi...biga sangdanghi manhi obnida. jjwagjjwag.... deoreobge manhi geugeol jjolddag majeumyeonseo geoleoganeun namja, jobyeongsun...geu sungan ! boibnida ! jeo meolriseo...
byeongsun : huraswi bulbic dwaessgessseumnida. cwaag- cwaag- ssodajineun bisjulgi sairo.

i huraswi bulbici palrapalra...palrapalra...wa...jugibnida. byeongsun : salgeum salgeum jjojagaseo boniggan...anina dareulgga.... huraeswi deunge yeojadeura i usaneul hananeun sseugo, hananeun deulgo gabnida....saranghaneun nampyeonhate usan gajdajulrago ! kya!
yeogiseo camgoro uri manuraneun malijyo, apaseo nuweoman issneungeoi beolsseo sanyeonjjae...

ddaraseo na hante usan hanbeon, dosirag hanbeon gajdajun jeogi eobsneun..... duman :(mal ggeunheumyeo) a geuraeseo, hayeoteun ..... geuyeojal eoddeoghaesseo? byeongsun : geunyang.....barabwassjyo....nampyeoni nugunji cam johgess.... yonggu : i saeggiga ! jal nagadaga... yongguga deosbeoseon sineun weokeobaleul cikyeodeulgiman haedo, byeongsuneun hwadeuljjag umceureodeunda. hanbal ddeoleojin taeuneun bansinbanyi haneun pyojeoeungro byeongsuneul gwancalhago issda. duman : ja, gyeolgug yeojareul dwijjogeseo cingeoji? byeongsun : a, ye...ye...geureongeo gateundeyo...amuraedo..... yonggu : geurae angeurae? jeonghwaghage imma ! byeongsun : a mweo...(jungeol) geureon ggumeul ggungeo gatseubnida. byeongsun : ne majseumda....majseumda. geuyeoja dwieseo ...ireohge...(sonbadag pyeoboimyeo) dangsu geu yeojayi mogdeolmireul pag-galgyeossdeon geos gatseubnida.
nalkaroun dangsu cob!

byeongsun : yeojaga biteul- haessgessjyo? ibeonen repeuteu hug-eurudaga pag- galgyeossseubnida. byeongsun : yeopgurireul malijyo. u-ug hamyeonseo sseureojyeossgessjyo? byeongsun : geudaero deopcimyeonseo... ildan wisdoributeo beosgyeobolgga haguseon... duman : jamggan jamggan...geogiseo geureonge aniltende. byeongsun :(jamsi meong...) a...aha! majseubnida. solbateuro ! yeojareul ggeulgo solbateuru sinmungisae yihamyeon nongileseo solbatggaji muryeo 200yeo meta!
geuraedo gabnida....bisgileul calbadag calbadag....

byeongsun : solbateseo ginyang jabbaddeuryeossjyo...geuriguseon mogeul ggwa-ag jolreubnida. duman : mweolro jolrasseo? byeongsun : eum...seutaking....? byeongsun : mweoyeossdeura...? a..... duman : saenggag anna? (jagi gaseumggee mweonga garineun sinyunghamyeo....hinteureul junda.) byeongsun : a majda! burajya! burajabnida! bineoseu bura! geu burajyaro mogeul ggwag jjoreuneun i yeojaga gabjagi doleul jibeoseo nae i gwanjanolireul geudaero pag-au...

byeongsun : geureongayo? .....a.....igeon eoje bame johyeongsanimi.... yonggu : siggeureo! (jadongkamera deulgo) son ciweobwa! yonggujjogeuro gwanjanoli naemilmyeo umjigim meomcuneun jobyeongsun. peog-teojineun kamera peulraeswi. byeongsun : dolmengie bbag- majasseuni...dangyeonhi jeongsini nagabeoryeossjyo...geureoda seug byeongsun : naega byeonso soge issneungeora..ddongtonge malya...au...ggumsogeseodu ddongnaemsaega pagjjajeungseureon hansumeul pug-naeswineun duman, aye nogeumgireu tug ggeobeorinda.
duman dwijjogeseo paljangggin cae bogoman issneun taeyun, gabjagi nuni beonjjeog ddeuinda.
-sungan, jjalbge inseoteu doeneun(ssin31) cosojangmyeon. haggyobyeonso yaegireul hamyeo jjongaldaeneun sohyeongwa
jocnage ddwigo ddo ddwigo...mag ddwidaga ggumeseo tag ggaebonigga..ibuli ddameuru jjwa-ag taeyun : ibwa! (bbyameul calssag cimyeo) jeongsin jom caryeobwa! dangsin byeonso yaegin eodiseo
gabjagi ggieodeuneun taeyuneul meolddunghage baraboneun dumangwa yonggu, yiahan moseubida. taeyun, mweonga meorisogi ganjireoun deus...hancameul saenggaghaneun pyojeongida.
haggyoe deuleoseon taeyunyi siyae deuleooneun adamhan undongjanggwa 4ceung geonmul. minbangwi(hwasaengbang)hunryeoni hancangira undongjangeneun daepi hunryeonjungin yeohagsaengdeuli juljieo anja

haegpogtani teojigeon, saenghwahag mugiga teojigeon, aranggos eobsi jangnancigo ggilggildaenda. 4ceung gyosil cangmuneneun bisangtalculhunryeoneul wihan talculyong heonggeopteoneoli cangmunbuteo undongjangggaji

gyosil cangmuneneun gyosawa hagsaengdeul myeoc myeongi junbihago issgo, arae undongjangeneun deulgeosi hwasaengbang hunryeonyi hairaiteudabge moduyi siseoni 4ceung gyosilro hyanghae issneun gaunde....
taeyundo 4ceung gyosiljjogyi yeohagsaengdeuleul bogo issda. cosoeseo mannassdeon sohyeonyi moseubi S# 58. 4ceung gyosil
ceyugbog carimeul han cae talculyong teoneole deuleogal junbireul hago issneun sohyeonyi ddolmangddolmanghan
seonsaengnimyi jisie ddara gilgo hayan heonggeop teoneolro deuleoganda.
miggeureojyeo naeryeoganeun sohyeonyi sijeomeuro boineun ontong hayan teoneolsog..apgwa dwi ggeuti boiji anhneunda.
S# 59. bogdo- yanghosil bogdoreul naranhi geoleogago issneun taeyungwa sohyeonyi moseub.

dareun aideuleun yeojeonhi hwasaengbang hunryeon ddaemune irijeori juljieo idonghago issda. taeyun : wae geurae? sohyeon : agga naeryeoodaga ggajyeosseoyo..... geu sogedu jandolmengi gateunge isseossnabwa. sohyeoneun ggajin heorijjog sali sseurarin deus, jagguman soneul dwiro hae ceyugbogeul deulceoggeorinda. yanghosil muneul yeolgo deuleoseoneun sohyeon, yanghosileun teongbieo issda. sohyeon : ...... seonsaengnim an gyesine...... daeddeum bancanggo ddawireul caja yeogijeogireul dwijeoggeorigi sijaghaneun sohyeon. taeyun : (gati dwijimyeo) neo jeobddae yaegihan geu byeonso yaegi, nuguhante deuleungeonya? sohyeon : molrayo, geunyang...aedeuli jaemiro haneun yaegijyo. museoun yaegi jal mandeuneun aedeul taeyun :.....jeongmal haggyo byeonsoe mweoga issneungeoya? sohyeon :(kig useumyeo) aedeulmada yaegiga da dalrayo. salhaedoen yeoja sicega byeonsomite jugeun yeoja gwisindeuli byeonso mite da moyeoseo bammada uneungeoda...eojjeogu jeojjeogu.... seorabeseo keodaran bancanggoreul cajanaen taeyun, sangceoe bareul yeongoreul cajanaen sohyeon. jusa majneun cimdaee seug eopdeurineun sohyeon, buggeureoumdo antago daeddeum undongbog eongdeongireul seuljjeog gganaerinda. ajig eorinaiceoreom jogeuman sohyeonyi cegu, heoriwa eongdeongi gyeonggyeseonjjeume geulghin sangceoga taeyun, josimseure yageul bareugo geu wiro baendeureul butinda. sohyeon : byeonsoe han beon gaboseyo. yogi dwismadange taeyun :(baendeu butimyeo)...jamggan, umjigijima.... sohyeonyi salgac wiro salposi deopyeojineun bancanggo...salmyeosi myeoc beon nulreojuneun taeyunyi son sohyeon : geurigu cam, byeonso maen ggeuteseo du beonjjae kane ggog gaboseyo. sohyeon : (jinjihan ceog) geogi gumeongeuru naeryeoda bomyeonyo, ggeomggeomhan gumeong miteseoyo......jugeun yeojaga (nun higgeus-ddeumyeo) ireoh-ge olryeodabondadeyo. geureom seoro nuni ddag majucineun geoji! sohyeoneul barabodaga ssig-useobeorineun taeyun. sohyeondo deongdala useobeorinda.
S#60. haggyo dwismadang, byeonso.
hagsaengdeuleun modu sueobe deuleogago, daenajijiman jwijugeun deus joyonghan haggyo.
amudo eobsneun dwismadangeul geoleoganeun taeyunyi nune nalgeun jaeraesig byeonsoyi moseubi boinda.

nalga bbajin munjjagdeuli byeonsoro salgeumeoni deuleoseoneun taeyun...hwajangsil naebuneun najindedo joyonghi dulreoboneun taeyuneun byeoge geuryeojin isanghan nagseodeulgwa geuldeuleul hanhana hulteobonda. jagido moreuge ggeuteseo du beonjjae kaneuro siseoni hyanghaneun taeyun. josimseure dagaga....salmyeosi geu muneul yeolreoboryeogo sonjabireul jabneunda. sungan, hwig-yeolrineun duljjaekanyi mun! munsogyi hayan os yeojawa jeongmyeoneseo nuni majucineun taeyun! sunganjeogeuro bimyeongeul ggyag- jireuneun jeolmeun yeoja...hayan yisa gauneul geolcin yanghoseonsaengida.

yangho : mweoya jigeum? ireondeseo? sudosga yeope taeyungwa naranhi seon yanghoseonsaeng, yeojeonhi eoieobsdaneun pyojeongida. yangho : geuraedu geureohji...giggeos aedeul yaegi deudgu ireondena giusgeorindan malieyo? taeyun :........(minmanghan deus jjubbisgeorinda.) yangho : gaman...geugeo ddaemune aedeuli geureon yaegilhana? yangho : sasil nado du beonjjeum?...... geuyeoja jigjeob bon jeogi issgin isseoyo. taeyun : yeojayo? yangho : ....uneun yeoja. eonjeyeossdeora? naje i byeonsoe anja issneunde, eodiseo yeoja
deulryeo odeoragu. geuraeseo naol ddae bonigga.....(soneuro garikimyeo) jeojjog bateseo eoddeon

ilhada malgo seoseo.........ulgo issdeuraguyo. yanghoseonsaengyi songgeuteul ddaraganeun taeyunyi siseon. byeonso dwijjogeuro isseunamanahan najeun damjanggwa geu dwiro pyeolcyeojin najeumaghan eondeoggwa bati taeyun : geunyang....uleoyo? yangho : honja uleoyo. geunyang ireohge seoseo. bogu issjani cam isanghade... yeogi jinagadaga... daenaje aju jo-yonghal ddaeyeossneunde...... ddo yeoja uleumsoriga ganeudarahge deulrideoragu. .... gibuni seomcishaeseo ireohge dulreobwassneunde...jeone geu
jeojjog (eondeogwi garikimyeo) eondeogwieseo yeogi byeonsojjogeul bomyeonseo seoissdeoraguyo.

jjalbeun inseoteu-yanghoseonsaengi bon gwanggyeong, ddoneun taeyuni sangsanghaneun gwanggyeongceoreom.... meolri seusanhan eondeogwie seoissneun han yeoja. eondeog araereul bogoissneun seomcishan imiji. eondeog wireul olryeodaboneun taeyun...haggyo dwispyeonbuteo sijagdoen eondeogeneun oeddan nonggaga hana mundeug eondeog wireul gati barabogo issneun taeyungwa yangho seonsaeng. najeumaghan damjangneomeo jib anjjogeul deulyeodaboneun taeyun. jogeuman yeoja hanaga bbalraereul neolgo issda. yangmal, seutaking, beuraejieoreul yeonieo neoldeon yeoja... imsinjunginji araesbaega bulrughada. mweonga saenggagnan deus meonghage bbalraedeuleul baraboda damjangneomeo taeyungwa nuni majucinda.
taeyun ; silryehabnida. gyeongcalindeyo.......
sunsiggane cangbaeghaejineun yeojayi eolgul, neogs nagan saramceoreom juwireul duribeongeorideoni,
taeyuni madang aneuro deuleoseoja....... seodulreo bangmuneul dadgo mungoriggaji geoleo jamguneun
muneul geoleo jamgeugo amureon eungdabi eobsneun yeoja. jamsi hu.....canghoji mun neomeoro yeojayi uleumsoriga seoseohi deulryeo ogi sijaghanda.
taeyun : gwaencanheunigga....i mun jom yeoleoboseyo. yeoja : joesonghaeyo. naega gyeongcalseoe galra geuraessneunde.......museoweoseo.......
taeyun : jom ceonceonhi yaegi haebwayo. gyesog ulgiman hadeon yeoja, gabjagi uleumsoriga ddug geucinda.

yeoja :(dasi ulmeogimyeo) geuraedo bbalri gaseyo. nampyeoni almyeon keunil nayo. taeyun : ani, dodaece museun......mweon yaeginji jom cageuncageun.... danghwangseure seoissdeon taeyun....mundeug yeojaga bbalraejule neoleonoheun sogosdeulro siseoni hyanghanda. barame heundeulrineun paenti, seutaking, beuraejieoreul caryero barabodeon taeyun...

mweonga museoun sasileul jiggamhan deus, eolguli cangbaeghaejinda. neujohu eoduun bangan, sabogcarimyi gweongwiogi eondeogjib yeojawa maju anja issda. banganyi nalgeun mulgeondeuleun sigol bubuyi gananhan saenghwaleul goseuranhi boyeojunda. yeoja : na imsin 7gaeweoljjae yeyo..(ulda usda) neujge saenggin aera nampyeoni daegae
yeoja : heuheug....nan wae anjugeosseulgga...nan wae.....!
yeoja : geunal bame ...biga wassneunde....buseulbuseul wassneunde....
S# 64-1 peulraeswi baeg. ansongjunghaggyo byeonso dwijjog. eondeogi sijagdoeneun bugeun...jibeul hyanghae holro geoleogago issneun

jigeumgwaneun dalri baega beulrughaji anheun nalssinhan moseubida. mweonga ingiceogeul neuggin deus, dwireul hilggeum dolaboneunde...eodumsogeul seureureu-umjigineun geomeun yeoja : (V.O.) haggyo dwi byeonso jjogieossdeongeo gatayo.... yeoja : (cangbaeghan eolgulro)jogeuman kal gateungeol nae yeopgurie gajda daessneunde...
sunsiggane.....aju sunsiggane.... S# 64-3 geunalbam eondeog arae

eodum soge heurishage boyeojineun imiji...seutakingeuro yeojayi sonmogeul ggongggong mugggo issneun yeojayi beosgin yangmale dolmaengi hanareul seug jibeoneohneun beominyi son..... ginjangdoen eolgulro eondeoggileul naeryeogago issneun taeyungwa gwiog...gwiogeun eondeogjib yeojamankeumina gwiog : geuriguneun.... geu yangmalro ibe jaegaleul mulryeossdaeyo. taeyun : ...hwagsilhae. geu nomiya.( pyojeong gudeojinda.) gwiog : geurigon paentireul meori wiro ssyiudeoni... geu daeume... taeyun : jamggan, geu nom eolguleun...eolguleun mos bwassna? jogeum jeon. eondeogjib bang an. yeoja : geunom eolguleul anboryeogu eogjiru eogjiru gogaereul sugyeosseoyo.....eolgul bomyeon nal
geurae, eolguleul bwasseumyeon nal jugyeosseulgeoya! nan anbwasseo!
yeoja :(ddeolrideus)...geu nomi nae eolguleul paentiru deopeo ssyiunigga...geuge
S# 64-6 geunal bam.

eodum sogyi geocin sumsori. pulbate nubhyeojin eondeog jib yeojayi eolgul.... eolgul wiro deopeo ssyiweojin paenti ddaemune yangmalro jaegali mulrin ibbubunman boinda. taeyun(V.O.) : geureom...amugeosdo mosbwassdan yaegiya....? mweonga saenggagnan deus.....gabjagi geoleumeul ddag meomcuneun gwiog. gati gadeon seotaeyundo balgeoleumeul gwiog : cam...geu son!
...geunom son iyagireul haesseossneunde...

eondeogeul naeryeoon du sarameun eoneudeos ansongjunghaggyo byeonso dwispyeon. ' geunal bam'yi jangsoe gwiog, byeonsowa jabcobat, eondeog jjogeul dulreobomyeo... gwiog : yeogiyeyo...ceoeume yeogibuteo geu nomi yeojareul ggeulgo gassneunde... jayeonseure beomin yeoghali doemyeo gwiog dwijjoge seoge doeneun taeyun.
gwiog : han soneun kaleul deuli daego isseossgu...dareun hansoneun ibeul maggu...
S# 64-8. geunal bam.
bat jeojjog pyeon gilro jogeuman raiteu bulbiceul bicumyeo jajeongeo han daega jinaganda.
ubireul ibeun 40dae namjaga neugeushage molgo ganeun jajeongeo....
beominyi soni ibeul ggwag maggo issneun gaunde, yeojayi ganjeolhan siseonman jajeongeo bulbiceul sungan, ibeul mageun soneul seureureu...ddeeonaeneun beomin! yeojayi ibeul jayurobge haejunda.

cabunhago ssaneulhan beominyi mogsori...ibeul an magassneundedo yeojaneun amu sori mosjireugo maci beominyi naenggireul saengsaenghi neuggineun deus.........soreum dodeun pyojeongyi gwiog. ddohan gudeoissneun eolgulida. gwiog : geureonde ibeul ggwag maggo isseul ddae, beomin soni malijyo... yeoja : ddan geon jal gieogi annaneunde...geugeo hananeun ddoryeoshage saenggagnayo. yeojaceoreom nae ibeul mageun soni ...jinjja gobgu.....budeureobgu.....
yeoja :(ddeolmyeo) eoddeohge geureon goun soneuro ....geureon jiseul.....
beominyi hyigo bodeuraun soni... eondeogjib yeojayi maensal eodingareul seu -eug hulteo olrineun soreumggicineun imiji.
S# 65. dalrineun ca sog.

onmome soreumi dodeun deus, cangbaeghage gudeoissneun gwiogyi pyojeong. cunghyeoldoen nunbiceuro eodumsogeul eungsihamyeo egselreteoreul balbneun taeyun. cimmug sogyi bamgil....taeyunyi sijeomeuro gugdo wi jiteun eodumsogyi noran jungangseoni
S#66. cwijosil naebu / bogdo

hwamyeon gadeug...basjule geogguro maedalrin jobyeongsunyi eolguli boinda. jameul mosja gaegireumi heureugo, piga ssolryeo sibbeolgeohge doen goeihan eolgul. geu baro yeopeuro cunghyeoldoen nunbicyi bagduman eolgul...donggeuran injureul byeongsun nunape deuli byeongsun : jjigeumyeon...jinjja...jadu doenayo? duman :(ggeudeog) bbalri jjiggo, pug-ja. byeongsun :.....jeungmalijyo....? byeongsun, geogguro maedalrin cae jasinyi eomjisongarageul bbalgan injue ggug nureunda. duman bandaepyeone anja issneun joyonggu, seoryuceolro badcyeodeun jinsulseoreul naeminda. jobyeongsunyi bbalgan eomjisongaragi joyonghi jinsulseoro hyanghaneunde..... sungan, beolkeog yeolrineun cwijosilyi mun.......seotaeyuni deuleoonda. jinsulseoro hyanghadeon byeongsunyi soneul deobsseog umkyeojwineun taeyun, cancanhi sonbadageul deulyeoda bonda.
eoridungjeol cyeodaboneun dumangwa yonggu.
taeyunyi sijeomeuro boineun...gudeunsali deogjideogji buteoissneun byeongsunyi geocin sonbadag.... eodubge gudeojineun taeyunyi pyojeong. byeongsunyi soneul nohgo gipeun hansumeul tohaenaenda.
joyonghi taeyunyi myeogsaleul jabneun duman....myeogsaleul geosege bburicimyeo nagabeorineun taeyun.
S# 67. gangryeogban samusil.
sanggidoen eolgulro deuleooneun taeyun, caegsang apeseo cangbaeghage anja issneun gwiogeul hyanghae. taeyun : geogi...agga geu jinsul naeyong, seoryuro jeongri hae jweo. hanado bbaddeuriji malgu!
gwiog :(jeongsin carimyeo) ne!

geu sungan ddara deuleoon duman, dajjagojja taeyunyi myeogsaleul umkyeojwideoni geocilge kaebinese ggyag-bimyeong jireuneun gwiog...bunnoe can dumani pogpungceoreom taeyuneul molacinda. ddaraon yonggyu, joyonghi baggeul salpideoni salmyeosi samusil muneul dadneunda.
duman : jaemissji? magpane ddo jaebburineunge geureohgedo jaemissji, i gaesaeggiya!
taeyun : .... igeo nwa....

taeyun : ....nado jeo ingani beominimyeon johgesseo! geureonde anya, aniran malya. jeo inganeun anirago! algesseo? dulyi geocin ssaume cama malrijido moshago balman dongdong gureuneun gwiog. sungan, samusil muni yeolrimyeo ggeocilhan eolgulyi sindongceol banjangi bulssug deuleoonda. mun apeul maggo seon joyongguwa ko apeseo majuseoneun banjang, soneneun basjulmungcireul deulgo banjang :(basjul deuleo boimyeo) neoji? niga jobyeongsuni maedalassji? banjang : i gaesaeggi!(jointeu ggamyeo) neo yosae bunwigi molra? i miryeonhan...... sungan, bandaepyeon guseogeseo dwieongkyeoissneun dumangwa taeyuneul bogo maneun sindongceol. banjang : ani igeosdeuli.....! pogbalgwa dongsie buldojeoceoreom doljinhaneun sinbanjang...malriryeo dalrabutneun yonggu... wanjeonhi dwieongkineun banjanggwa duman, taeyun...samusili dolyeon jiogyi asurajangeuro gwiog : jeogi jamgganman !
geureona heungbunhan namjadeuleun jeomjeom deo dwieongkyeo gagiman hago...
yuriga ggaejil deusi soricineun gwiog...geujeseoya eoridungjeol gwiog jjogeul baraboneun namjadeul. gwiog : ......igeo......(radio bolryumeul nopinda)
143. jijijig- radio sori. 'hwaseonggun taeaneubeseo aeceongjaga sinceonghaejusin....' deungdeungyi
gwie igeun melrodi<mojjareuteu rekwiem> yi seonyuli seumeolseumeol pieooreugi sijaghanda. banjang : jigeum naoneungeoya? saengbangsong?

sungan dumanyi myeogsaleul pulgo hudadag- cangga jjogeuro ganeun taeyun, cangmuneul yeoleo jeojhinda. eoneusaeinga naerigo issneun bi....! modudeul mangyeonjasil cangbaggyi bisjulgireul taeyun : banjangnim! oneul bame teojibnida....! (jangmyeon baggwimyeon) ...banjanggwa gweongwiog, dul da dageubhan pyojeongeuro jeonhwa suhwagireul hanassig banjang : jeongyeong 2gaejungdaeman puleojusibsyo! da jeongboga isseoseo geureobnida!....mweoragoyo? gwiog : yeoboseyo? jeonyeogyi keulraesigijyo? geubhan ggeoninde imhyiceolPD jom baggweojweoyo...mweoyo? taeyun :(suhwagi bbaeseo deulmyeo) geogi ADjom baggweojweo bwa! wae geu kijaggo angyeongsseun ae! mweo? .....joha geureom, eojjaessgeon jigeum bangsongnagan gog sinceongja yeobseo, geugeo jeoldaeru geondeulji yeogi gyeongcalseoya! mweo ? jangnan?........yai gaesaeggiya!.....ya! yeoboseyo! goraegorae sorijireuda suhwagireul deonjyeobeorineun taeyun. jeonhwagiga buseojil deus... gwiog : seohyeongsanim, bangsonggugeun jega.... oetureul geolcimyeo dageubhi ddwicyeonaganeun gwiog neomeoro, simdeureonghage anja issneun duman, yongguyi moseubi boinda. taeyun : banjangnim, byeongryeogjiweoneunyo? banjang :(jeonhwaggeunheumyeo) jenjang! namneun byeongryeogi eobsdae...joedadeul suweonsinae siwijinab joyonghi bissoriman deulryeooneun gaunde...nugungayi soni jogeuman kalro bogsunga ggeobjileul eodum sogeseo cabunhage ggeobjileul beosgyeonaeneun hayahgo seomsehan son..... nongsuro yeop dugbanggileul geoleogadeon namjaai. gabjagi balgeoleumeul meomcunda. gilyeop galdae wie daerongdaerong geolryeoissneun yeoja paenti. nongsuro araejjogeuron, sangyineun beosgyeojin cae du soni dwiro muggin yeojasicega boinda. gigeobeul haeseo dalryeoganeun namjaai, deunge maen caeggabangi secage culreonggeorinda. ddodasi yeojayi sice ape udukeoni moyeoseon banjanggwa hyeongsadeul. yegodoen cunggyeogimedo bulguhago...modudeul amulhago jeolmangjeogin pyojeongdeulida. duman : anmiseon 28se. suweonsinae hisaeseo ileul macigo jibeuro odaga...danghaessseubnida. banjang :....... bugeomyi: jamggan... ige mweoji? mweonga isanghan geol balgyeonhan deus, josimseure siceyi eumburo pinseseul gajyeoganeun bugeomyi... josimseureobge mweongareul ggeujibeonaeneunde...nureon bandal moyangyi geosi naonda. banjang : mweoya geuge? bugeomyi : igeo...bogsunga jogag anya? ayeonsilsaeghaneun hyeongsadeul, eolgulmajeo cangbaeghaejineunde....
145. bugeomyi : deo issneunde.......

ganeulgo isanghan sumsorireul naebbumeumyeo, eumbueseo gyesog bogsunga jogageul ggeujibeo naeneun bogsunga jogagi hana, dul, naol ddaemada jeomjeom deo hayahge jilryeoganeun hyeongsadeulyi eolgul. geumsog geureus wie daseos...yeoseos...ilgob....bogsunga jogagi jeomjeom ssahyeo ganda. jagido moreuge gogaereul dolrineun banjang, jumeonieseo dambaereul cajneunda. gyesog umjigineun pinses....majimageuro bogsunga ssi bubuni naonda. bugeomyi : jeonbu......ahobgae. wanjeonhi cangbaeghaejin hyeongsadeul...malmuni maghin deus amu maldo haji moshanda. hwamyeon gadeug ahob gaeyi bogsunga jogagi boinda. duman : seouleseo ireon geo bon jeog isseo? taeyun : (doridori) ....ceoeuminde.... gin yijae geolteoanjeun duman,<geumyeon>pyosi baro araeeseo dambaereul piweo mulgo issda. yeope anjeun taeyuneun gogaereul mureupggaji pug sugigo jjigeureojyeo issda. duman :(hansumeul pug swimyeo)......dangsin mali majneungeo gatae. duman : ireon jiseun amuna hal su issneunge aningeo gatda. yeope issdeon nonghyeob daieorireul pyeodeoni, geu soge butyeojin sajindeuleul ddeudeonaegi sijaghaneun jobyeongsun, baeggwangho geurigo dongne yangacideul sajini caryecarye sseuregitong sogeuro deuleoganda. duman : geu dongan heos jisman haesseo...... gyesog gogaereul sugigo issdeon taeyun, jogeumssig eoggaega deulmeogdeulmeog hagi sijaghanda.

gabjagseureon useume eoridungjeolhan duman, taeyuneun songarageuro dumanyi undonghwareul taeyun : dangsindo naiseuyeossguman naiseu....en ai ssi i duman : mweoya gabjagi..(eoieobsneun deus, pisig) ...cam nae......geureoneun dangsineun? (taeyun sinbal bomyeo) mweoya igeo? adidaseu? ce....adidaseu sineossdago jaeneun geoya taeyun :(kigkig daemyeo) ....hahaha...jasehi jom bwa. duman eolgul jjogeuro balggumcireul seug deuleo boineun taeyun, jasehi bomyeon adadis rago
taeyun : geurae adadiseu...hihihi! hyeongsa weolgeube
naendeul byeolsu isseo?

duman : urin eonje naiki hanbeon sineo bona......ssiba....... hyeongsadeuli sicesil apeseo kigkigkig usgo issneun goesanghan punggyeong...sungan bugeomyiga muneul beolkeog hwadeuljjag useumeul meomcuneun dumangwa taeyun. bugeomyi : jeonhwa jom badabwa! seoulirae! sanggidoen eolgulro bangsonggug jeonhwagireul deulgo issneun gwiog. hwamyeon gadeug. jogeuman yeobseo wiro ddobagddobag sseuyeojin geulssiga boinda.
'bioneun nal ggog teuleojuseyo. sinceonggogeun mocareuteu rekwiem 1beon. taeaneseo sseulsseulhan

gwiog : seohyeongsanim? jeoyeyo. yeobseo hwagbodwaesseoyo! ireumeun baghaeil. juso bulreo deurilggeyo. hwaseonggun taeaneub... gwiogyi mogsoriga gyesog ggalrimyeo...haeil jibeul hyanghae dalryeoganeun dumangwa taeyun. jibdeul neomeoro keodaran gongjangdeuli boineun maeul gileul ddara bbareuge geoleoganda. du saramyi nalgeun undonghwaga hwamyeon ap dwiro sumgabbeuge gyoca doenda. S# 74. baghaeilyi bang / naebu bigyojeog keun nonggayi cugsa han gwitungie byeoldoro buteoissneun jjogbang. teong bieoissda. bangeneun bikini osjanggwa gandanhan gajaedogudeul bbun. jeongrijeongdoni ggalggeumhada. jib baro yeopi gicasgilin deus, gica jinaganeun soriga yoranhage deulryeooneun gaunde... caegsang wie issneun sohyeong radioreul boneun taeyun, radioen keodaran nemo basderiga muggyeoissda. duman :(aelbeomsajin naeboimyeo) isaram jigeum eodigasseoyo? juin : gongjang nagassji. baru yogi gwangsin jeyag.....
S# 75. jeyaggongjang / naebu

bogjabhan gigyeraineul ddara umjigineun alyagdeul...subaegmyeongyi gongweondeuli jageobeul hago issda. jageobbanjangjjeum doeboineun sarami ureongcage soricinda. jageob banjang : ya! haeila! baghaeili! iri jom wabwara! dojurado yesanghan deus, bandaejjog culgueneun seotaeyuni imi maggo seoissda. gongjang jeojjogpyeoneseo eolguli hayan ceongnyeonhanaga ddabagddabag duman jjogeuro geoleoogi
nunbiceul banjjagimyeo geoleooneun seumusal namjisyi ggalggeumhan ceongnyeon...baghaeilida.
haeil : .........museun ilijyo? neomuna cabunhago bandeushan moseubyi baghaeil...ddulheojyeora baraboneun dumanyi siseoneul ddogbaro
caegsang ape mupyojeonghage anja issneun baghaeil.

geu majeun pyeoneuro ...haeileul majubogo anjeun taeyun, yonggu geurigo banjangggaji.... joyonghan gaunde seororeul cyeodaboneun haeilgwa hyeongsadeul. isanghan bunwigida. gin jeongjeogeul ggaego gabjagi dagaganeun taeyun. haeilyi sonbadageul deulyeoda bonda.
baghaeilyi hayahgo ganeulgo seomsehan soni boyeojinda.
taeyun :(manjimyeo) soni aju budeureobne.....gongjangeseo ilhanjin orae andwaessnabwa? taeyun : 9weol? jagnyeon ceos sageon nagi jigjeonine...
taeyun : geureonigga niga gundae jedaehagu i dongnegongjangeuro on hubuteo...... sageondeuli juljuli ileonan semiran malya. geuji?

haeilyi sigeonbangjin pyojeongeul noryeoboneun yonggu, muyisigjunge eolguli ggumteul-handa. duman :(haeiljjogeuro gamyeo)...pali yeojaceoreom maendeulmaendeul hasyeo. teoldo eobsgo.... mal ggeutnagiga museobge hwag-haeilyi bajireul umkyeojwineun duman.

geureona wanryeogeuro mileobutyeo bajiwa paentireul hanggeobeone naeryeobeorineun duman. sungan.....baghaeilyi geugoseul bogo nolraneun hyeongsadeul. duman : ireoljul alasseo....neo weonraebuteo teoli hanado eobseo? haeil :(mobsi bulkwaehan deus) i ssi...gundae jedaehal ddae mileobeoryeosseoyo ! (baji olrinda.) haeil : malnyeon hyugaddae sacanggae gassdaga byeongi olmaseo...da mileobeoryeosseoyo. duman : geurae? geureom geuddaebuteo yeojadeulman bomyeon da deoreobgu, bogisilhgu, jugigu sipgu
haeil :(pisig) ce....maldo an dwae......

haeilyi binjeonggeorime nunbice salgiga doneun taeyun, yeobseoreul ggeonae deulimilmyeo. taeyun : i yeobseo niga bonaengeo majji! taeyun : jeonedo yeoreobeon bonaenjeog issji? taeyun : bi oneunnal teuleodalra geuraessji?
taeyun : geu norae naolddaemada yeogiseo yeoja jugeungeo alji?
taeyun : molra? yeogi bangsonggirog bwabwa. duman : geurae? joha. eojedo niga sinceonghan eumag nawassji?
duman : radio deuleossji? jeonyeogyi keulraesig?
duman : geu peuro ggeutnange jeonyeog yeodeolbsi. ggeutggaji deuleosseo? duman : gyesog nibangeseo deuleossnyago? duman : geureom niga sinceonghan norae daeume museun gog nawasseo?
taeyun : eoje jugeun anmiseon ! samangcujeongsigan jeonyeog ilgobsieseo ilgobsi ban sai! neon geu sigane eumageul deudda malgo ddwicyeo nagangeoya!
camdamoshago caegsangeul ggwang geodeocaneun joyonggu. nadwingguneun caegsang, geureona baghaeileun heuteureojim eobsi geudaero anja issda.
ohiryeo yonggureul noryeoboneun haeil...geureona sogeuron duryeounji, songgeuteul pareureu ddeoneun geos haeil : ddaeryeo, ddaeryeobwa...... duman : geonbangjin saeggi ! neo joyonghi anhae?
yonggu : neo i saeggi hanbeon jugeo bolrae?
haeil : joha jugyeo! dangsinnedeul joeeobsneun saram jabada jogcineungeo, dongne aedeuldu da ala!
haeil : nan andanghae! nan jeoldae andanghal georagu!
banjangyi bulhotongeuro jamsi cajaon jeongjeog...modudeul singyeongi gonduseon moseubida.
banjang : yonggu, neon jom dwiro bbajyeo isseo.
dwiro mulreonaneun yonggu, taeyuneun sseureojin caegsangeul dasi ileukyeo seumyeo
baghaeil. eoje geu peuroreul ggeutggaji deuleossdan maliji..... geureom niga sinceonghan rekwiemi ggeutnasseul ddae, dijeiga mweorago haessneunji malhaebwa.
dijeiga aju insangjeogin menteureul haessgeodeun. sinceongjain ni yaegido hamyeonseo malya.... ggeutggaji deuleossdamyeon geugeol gieog moshal riga eobsji !
taeyun : deuleosseumyeon malhaebwa!
taeyun : joha...gieog nage haejuji.....

gabjagi cwijosilyi hyeonggwangdeungeul peog ggeobeorineun taeyun, guseoge issdeon kaseteureul deulgowa caegsangwiyi jogeuman seutaendeu bulbicmani taeyungwa haeilyi eolguleul eoseumpeure bicuneun mocareuteu rekwiemyi seonyuli seoseohi pieooreugo..... taeyun : jaldeuleobwa. baro eoje ...neon igogeul deuleossda. gieogi saengsaenghaji? taeyun : baggeneun biga jureugjureug ogo, eumageun deulryeoogo...seoseohi heungbuni doesala
i eumagman deuleumyeon niga neul hadeon jisi issjanha....

taeyun : geu jiseul wihaeseoramyeon...cuun nal bireul majadu johgu. myeoc siganssig nondureonge johgu........ neohanten geu modeunge da jeulgeoun geoji? geuji? haeil :......jibeocyeoyo ! taeyun : ni soneuru sseudadeumeul yeojadeul salgyeolman saenggaghamyeon......neomuna jeulgeoungeo jeomca gojodoeneun rekwiem seonyulceoreom taeyunyi mogsorido jeomjeom deo gyeogangdoego taeyun : geureoda jeomjeom deo jaemiga namyeon...eojeceoreom bogsungareul jibeo neoheo hanjogag, dujogag, se jogag! nes! daseos ! yeoseos! il.....
micil deusi soricimyeo kaseteu naedongdaengicineun baghaeil, sarajineun rekwiem seonyul. bogoissdeon yonggu, baghaeil jjogeuro momeul nalrinda. yonggu : i gaesaeggi ! banjang : bul kyeo !
seutaendeuga buseojyeo wanjeonhan amheug sog....... joyongguga baghaeileul jisbalbneun deus, haeilyi bimyeongsoriwa caegsang, jibgideuli dwingguneun sori.

gohamcineun banjanggwadumanyi mogsori...amheugsogyi asurajang. taeyun : geuman deulhae- ! cocwehago hiseuterighan pyojeongyi banjang, beolseodeus seoissneun joyongguyi gaseumggereul kugkug banjang : neo i saeggiya... naega jeobeonedu hanbeon gyeonggohaessji. jumeogsseuji malragu. banjang : gija saeggideul jigeum sabangeseo keungkeunggeorigu danyeo, neo os beosgu sipnya? banjang : neo igeo gwandumyeon mweo halgeonde? i musighan noma...neo mweo ddangeo halggeo isseo? eong? gogae sugin yonggu, ulkeoghaneun gibuneul eognureudeus..... banjang : apeuru neon cwijosile deuleo gajidu ma, amu doumi an dwae. naengjeonghage mal ggeutnaego, hwig nagabeorineun banjang. teong bin hwajangsile holro nameun yonggu. sohyeongkaseteuyi seuwicireul kyeoneun taeyun. cwijo junge nogeumdoen baghaeilyi mogsoriga bureun baereul ango dabangyijae anjeun eondeogjib yeoja, bulanhan eolgulro juwireul dulreobonda. gwiogdo geureon geunyeoyi moseube deongdala bulanhage baneunghanda. eondeognyeo : i mogsori..(gyesog gwigiulyeo deuddaga)...biseushan geo gataeyo.
eondeognyeo : biseushande...(bulanhan deus )biseushagin hande...hwagsilhi moreugesseoyo.
taeyun : ......mianhaeyo. jigeum himdeusijyo. hajiman gyesog jugeonaganeun yeojadeul saenggagdu
beomineul mannabon sarameun dangsin hanabbunijanha....

eondeognyeo :.......(kaseteu barabomyeo) ireon soriruneun dojeohi moreugesseoyo. seutaendeuman kyeonoha eoduun cwijosil. sugeoneuro nuneul garin baghaeilyi eolguli boinda. haeil majeun pyeonyi seotaeyun, yeopeuro anja issneun eondeogjib yeojawa gweongwiogyi moseubdo boinda. haeil :(majimoshae)........sorijireugo sipji...geureona.....mosjireuji.... taeyun : dasi haebwa! haeil : sori jireugo sipji... geureona...(hwanaedeus) mweoya ige? taeyun : neo haessdeondaero haeboran malya i jasiga!
janddeug gwireul giuligo issneun eondeogjib yeoja, geuraedo pandanhagiga eoryeoun deus, eojireoun

yeope anjeun gwiog, bulanhan pyojeongeuro eondeognyeoyi soneul jabajugo issda. deo isang maleul an haneun baghaeil, sugeoneul muggeun cae gogaereul seug dolryeo eondeogjib yeojajjogeul haeil : .........imsin myeoc gaeweoljjaejyo? bureun baereul umkyeojwimyeo hwadeuljjag soseuracineun yeoja, eolguli saehayahge jilrinda. taeyun : i jasigi !........(baghaeil nunapeul magaseomyeo) haeil : jigeum mweo haneun geoya dodaece? wen imsanbuggaji deryeowaseo...... taeyun : siggeureo ! ib dagcyeo !(neuseunhaejin sugeoneul dasi ggwag joinda) gongpoe jilryeo eolguleul garineun eondeogjib yeojareul cwijosil baggeuro bucughae naganeun gweongwiog. gwiog : (jungeol)... dadeul micyeosseo...... duman : nimi.....moggyeogja han myeong cajgiga ireohge eoryeoun geonga? caegsange imareul daego eopdeurin taeyunyi eolguli (caegsang mit rou aenggeulro) boinda. amdamhan eolgulyi taeyun, mundeug yeopjari dumani singoissneun 'NICE' undonghwae siseoni

gabjagi beolddeog gogaereul deuneun taeyun, imayi nulrin jagugi sibbeolgeohda. taeyun : jeogi....ije waseonigga naega muleoboneun geonde...geuddae wae saneseo sabjilhamyeonseo, baeggwanghoga ihyangsug sageon, jomogjomog yaegi hadeongeo malya..... taeyun : geuddae...jeongmal geugeo gwanghohante miri gyoyugsikingeo anieossdan malya? duman : camnae....jeongmal anieossdanigga! taeyun : geureom eoddeohge .... geunyeoseogi... duman : isanghan iliji....
(taeyun hyanghae) ya-i saeggi bogi bodan gieogryeogi johne? meori joha......
gwangho : hyangsugi bbanseureul...hihi.....bbanseureul mojaceoreom ssyiudeoragu.
duman : jagiga bon geol yaegi haneungeo janha!
gogijib muni yeolrimyeo dumangwa taeyuni hwanggeubhage deuli dagcinda.
gwanghoabba : .....? (danghwanghamyeo) geulsse .....jom jeonggaji isseossneunde...oragsil gassna?
......eoneusae ggamggamhan bam. sigdangeneun myeocmyeoc sonnimdeuli jigeuljigeul gogi gubneun yeongireul
eungeunhi cojohan eolgulro anja issneun duman, janddeug cwihan yongguneun gyesog sojujaneul deulikinda. duman : neo wae geurae? (najimagi) jeogdanghi masyeo saeggiya....
aggabuteo sigdang TVeseoneun jeonyeog nyuseuga naogo issneunde...buceonseo seonggomun sageon,

mungwidong hyeongsa sosigi naonda. sugabcan cae ggeulryeoganeun mungwidong moseub, jaepanjeongeseo seonggomun sasileul buinhan dareun teibeulyi sulcwihan namnyeo, nyuseureul bomyeo 'jeoreon musighan saeggi....geosigireul sibbeolgeon nuneuro dolaboneun joyonggu. namnyeodeuleun oscarimeuro boa hansindae hagsaengjjeumeuro ibbeujanghan eolgulyi yeohagsaengdo bbeolgeon eolgulro dambaereul mulgo issda. yonggu, gyesogdoeneun mungwidong nyuseuga jjajeungnaneunji....jarieseo ileona TVcaeneoleul geureona baggwin caeneol ddohan jeonyeognyuseusigan. ddo mungwidong nyuseuga sijagdoenda.
jjajeungi pogbalhan yonggu, TVreul hyanghae nandeeobsi bin sojubyeongeul nalrinda. jeongtongeuro beuraungwane ggojhineun sojubyeong.
peong-hago teojyeobeorineun beuraungwan.... gwanghwaabbayi danghwangseureon eolgul... dumaneun jjajeungnaemyeo yongguyi dwitongsureul ddaerigo.....

sulcwihan namhagsaengeun ideuli hyeongsainjuleun ggumedo moreugo..... namhagsaeng : ou ajeossi !(eomji naemilmyeo) hwaggeun ! meosjjei !meosjjei! yeohagsaeng : (dambae ggonamun cae gwaenhi bagsucineun sinyung) ggabjuggeorineun namhagsaeng bogo seulgeumeoni ileoseoneun joyonggu, geudaero weokabaleul nalryeo teibeuleul dwieopeo beorinda.
yeohagsaengyi bimyeongi teojigo....oraedoen teibeuleun geu jarieseo bagsalnago
malrineun dumaneul geocilge bburicineun joyonggu. dwingguneun namhagsaengeul ddaragamyeo jisbalbgi yeohagsaeng : a- ag! gyeongcal bulreo ! gyeongcal!
joyonggu :(namhagsaeng jisbalbeumyeo) ...nine duli haessji...haesseo anhaesseo?

gwanghoabba, eojjeoljul molra uwangjwawang haneunde, joyongguneun micin deus nalddwimyeo sigdangeul yonggureul jejiharyeo dwijjogeseo dalrabutdeon duman, mundeug sigdang culibguro siseoni gojeongdoenda. eonjebuteo wa isseossneunji, meong-han pyojeongyi baeggwanghoga yurineomeoro sigdang anjjogyi asurajangeul jikyeobogo issda! duman : gwanghoya !.... eoleobuteun deus seoissneun gwanghoyi nuneneun jeongsineobsi naeryeojjighineun yongguryi weokeobal mani agmongeul doesaegideus gongpowa bunnoga dwibeombeogdoen eolgulyi gwangho, beolkeog muneul yeolgo aneuro gwanghoreul butjabeureo dalryeodeuneun duman, geureona gwanghoneun bureojin sigtag dari hanareul
gwangho : geu- man - hae ! (secage hwidureunda)

namhagsaengeul jisbalbneun yongguyi darie geudaero naeryeoggojhineun sigtagdari. sigtagdari ggeute gilge twieonaon mosi yongguyi balmog baggatjjoge pug -ggojhinda. yonggu : euagdarireul umkyeojwineun yonggu, jilgeobhaneun gwangho abba, il sungan joyonghaejineun sigdang. gwanghoreul igeuligeul noryeobomyeo, du soneuro teibeul darireul jaba baghin moseul ssu-ug bbaenaeneun geujeseoya geobi deolkeog naneunji, jogeumssig momeul ddeolmyeo dwisgeoleumjileul sijaghaneun gwangho... duman : ...gwanghoya jamgganman ! gwangho, geobe jilryeo hudadag ddwicyeonaganda.
'gwanghoya' oecimyeo ddaranaganeun duman.

bamangaega ggin maeul gileul ddara heogeobjigeob dalananeun gwangho, jeongsineobsi ddaraganeun duman. gogisjibeuro dolaodeon taeyun, iduleul moggyeoghago ddara dalrigi sijaghanda. eoneudeos ihyangsug sageoni nassdeon camggaebat geunceoe ireureo... dumanyi sone butjabhineun gwangho. gyesog geobe jilryeo heobujeog georineun gwangho, eolgulyi hwasangjagugi gimyohage ilgeureojinda. gwangho : (geobe gilryeo) jalmoshaessseumda ! jalmos haemda !

duman : gwaencanheo !(heogheog) gwaencanhdanigga ! gwangho : na jabeureo ongeo anya ! duman : geobnaejima gwanghoya...... mweo jom muleoboreo ongeoda. gwangho : (nuncibomyeo) annyeong... annyeonghaso ! hihi..... yeojeonhi bulanhan nunbiceuro dumangwa taeyuneul salpineun gwangho....deoldeol ddeolgo issda.
duman : jom jeone geugeon geunyang, eobsdeon ilro haja ! ssami nadabomyeon geureolsudo issji....
duman : neo geunal bamedu hyangsugi joljol ddaradanidaga....beomini ihyangsugi jugineun geo
duman : geurae majeo. geunde neo... geuddae hyangsugi jugin nom eolguleul bwasseo? taeyun : (dageubhage) beomin eolguleul bwassnyagu !
mweonga saenggaghadeus meonghan eolgulyi gwangho, god gogaereul ggeudeogigi sijaghanda.

gwanghoyi ggwagwang-soriwa hamgge sungan geunalbamyi jangmyeon inseoteu doenda. biga ssodajyeo naerineun eodumsogyi camggebat, beongaega beonjjeoghaneun sungan ! ggaesipdan dwie sumeoseo nuneul ggumbbeogigo issneun baeggwangho...mweonga boneun deus, hwidunggeureon taeyun : eolguleul bwassnyago ! eolgul ! gwangho : (ggeudeog) se beon bwasseo! beongae ggwagwang ! ggwagwang ! ggwagwang ! geureomyeon eolguldo beonjjeog !
dasi geunalbam inseoteu. hyangsugiyi mogeul haendeubaeg ggeuneuro joreugo issneun nugungayi dwismoseub !

geu nugunganeun...baghaeilin geos gatgido hago anin geos gatgido hada. ddodasi beongaega beonjjeoghaneun sungan(gwangaegege anboijiman)gwanghoyi nunen 'beomin'yi eolguli taeyun : geu eolgul jeonghwaghi saenggagna? gwangho : geurae ! se beon ! eolgul se beon bwassda !
gwangho : (ggeudeog) jal saenggyeossda ! .... naboda jal saenggyeossda !
deoldeol ddeoneun deus hamyeonseodo ddobagddobag daegguhaneun baeggwangho.
macimnae, duman jumeonieseo mweongareul ggeonae baeggwanghoyi nunape deuliminda... baghaeilyi
duman : niga bonge......i eolguliya?
taeyun :(ddeolrideus) sajin jal bwabwa! donggeuran nuneuro baghaeilyi sajineul deulyeodaboneun gwangho......amureon pyojeongi eobsda.
seomcishame jogeumssig ddeoneun geos gatgido hago...seulgeumeoni usneun geos gatgido hago... dolabeoril deus baraboneun hyeongsadeul...ieuggo gwanghoyi ibsuli ceonceonhi umjigigi
deo isang camji moshaneun taeyun, gwanghoyi hwasangibeun eolgule ddagwireul nalrimyeo.
taeyun : (agsseudeus) sajineul boranigga !
jamsi pyojeongi heurishage puleojineun gwangho... sajineul mulggeureomi barabonda. geureona... gwangho : na ilgob sal ddae, nuga nal agungie deonjyeossneunde......
sungan, gwanghoyi meonghan siseoni dumangwa taeyunneomeoro hyanghanda. gwanghoabbaga jeongsineobsi

dalryeowa neomeojideus dajjagojja taeyungwa dumaneul butjabgo neuleojineun gwanghoabba. gwanghoabba : aigu- hanbeonman bwajusibsyo !(ulbujijdeus) uri aega weonag jeongsini ....! duman : nwayo igeo! jigeum geuge aniranigga !

sungan hwadeuljjag dalanagi sijaghaneun baeggwangho. jjoja garyeoneun dumangwa taeyunege wanjeohi eonggyeobutneun gwangho abba. geureona du hyeongsareul butjabgien yeogbujog... bburicin dumani hudadag gwanghoreul jjojagagi duman : (juwi dulreobomyeo) baeggwangho! gwanghoya!
jeomjeom jiteojin bamangae ddaemune deodeoug boiji anhneun baeggwanghoyi moseub. irijeori dulreobodeon duman... mundeug ddugbang wie seo issneun gwanghoreul balgyeonhanda.
duman : gwanghoya ! geogiseo mweo hae !

geuwa dongsie....angae jeopyeoneseo dalryeooneun gicayi bulbici boinda. ceol gil hanbogpane seoseo gyesog mweongareul jungeolgeorimyeo gogaereul araewiro ggeudeogggeudeog georineun gicasgileul hyanghae jeonsogryeogeuro dalryeoganeun bagduman..... geureona gicaneun gwanghoreul hyanghae deoug bbalri doljinhae deuleoonda. duman : pihae ! bbalri pihae! micin deusi dalryeogamyeo soricineun duman, geureona gwanghoneun gamanhi duman jjogeul bogiman hal
gicayi apmeorineun gwanghoreul hyanghae doljinhaneunde....

gwanghoneun dumaneul hyanghae ssiig useumyeo... jagi eolgulyi hwasangjagugeul soneuro umkyeojwigo maci iljeone dumani gwanghoege geuraessdeon geosceoreom. ddoneun jigyeoun hwasangdeongeorireul ddeudeonaego sipeun geosceoreom.... sungan....ceondunggateun goengeumgwa hamgge geudaero gica apmeoriwa cungdolhaneun gwanghoyi momddungi ! koapggaji dalryeoon dumanyi eolgule pisdeongiga jjwag- ggieonjhyeojinda. pi beombeogdoen dumanyi eolgul wiro, gica cangyi bulbicdeuli hwig-hwig- jinaganda. ceocamhan sungane onmomi budeulbudeul ddeolrineun duman...dongmulgateun sineumsoriga mom sogeseobuteo ggeulheooreugi sijaghanda.

duman : i....gwanghoya....gwanghoya....... reil yeope deonggeumani nadwinggeulgo issneun gwanghoyi undonghwa... bulgeun piga mudeoissda. yeogwanbang yogsil. donggeuran sucae gumeongeuro piseoggin sudosmuli joljoljol heulreonaeryeoganda.

jjugeuryeo anja dumanyi pimudeun oseul bagbag munjilreo bbalgo issneun seolyeo, geunsimseure seolyeong : yeogi ireohge isseodo dwae? dadeul cajeul tende..... seolyeong : yo yeop setagsoe gaseo os bilryeoda julgga? daedabeobsi guseog jjoge anja issneun duman, gogaereul pug sugin geuneuljin eolgul.... mweongareul maci seororeul majubo deus, baghaeilyi eolgul sajineul ggolddolhi deulyeoda bogo issneun duman. misehage ddeolrineun dumanyi cunghyeoldoen du nun..... geurigo sajin sog baghaeilyi hayan eolgul....(dijolbeu doemyeon)....
.....hwamyeon gadeug, joyonghago ssaneulhan baghaeilyi eolguli boinda.

majeunpyeone anjeun seotaeyuni joyonghi haeileul noryeobogo issda. taeyun : urideuli useubji ? taeyun : neo hanal eoddeohge moshaeseo beodungdaeneun.....geureon uriga usgiji? taeyun : neo......dangjangeun pulryeonalji molrado, nahanteseo domanggal sun eobseo. algesseo? joyonghage seororeul majuboneun du saram...... pogbaljigjeonyi ginjanggami gamdonda.
165. S# 86. gangryeogban joyonghi gyeongcalseoreul ddeonaneun baghaeilyi moseubi gangryeogban cangmuneul tonghae boinda.

cangmungae naranhi seon taeyun, duman, yonggu.... modudeul gudeun eolgulro haeileul naeryeoda bogo issda. banjang caegsangwie pyeolcyeojyeo issneun sinmuneneun ireonjeoreon binanjo gisadeuli boinda. yuryeog yongyija baggun, gwiga yejeong.... hwagsilhan muljeung eobsgo moggyeogjado an natana galpangjilpanghaneun gyeongcalsusa, eolguleobsneun beomineun eodi issneunga? hwaseongsageon gwageo yongyija, dalrineun gicae tusin jasal. gyeongcal josa ihu jeongsin isang jeungse, gomunsusa yihog bulgeojyeo. banjang :(suhwagi deulgo) ye ye....geuge jeo sinmune naon geohagon yaegiga manhi .....anyo geureonge aniguyo... bonbujangnimggedu jinanbeone malsseum deuryeossneunde....... yeoboseyo? ....yeoboseyo? ireon gaesaeggiga !( suhwagi naeryeocimyeo) ssibsaeggi ! jocdo wanjeonhi cosangjib bunwigiyi samusil, dadeul banjanggwa nuni majuciji anheuryeo aesseuneunde, guseogjariyi gweongwiogeun jagijariyi jeonhwa suhwagireul pume deulgo nanceohage banjangeul gwiog : (suhwagi deuleoboimyeo) banjangnim jeo...guggwasu jeonhwandeyo..... geureona gyesog gwangbunsangtaein banjang, micin deusi jeonhwagireul naerijjigneunda. gwiog :(jogeuman mogsoriro) jeogi..... jeongaegi nawassdaeyo ! banjang : ......(hilggeum) mweorago ?
S# 87. guggwasu

hyeonggwangdeung bulbicarae dunggeureohge dulreoseon banjang, taeyun, duman, yongguyi eolgul. coebagsa : geu dongan pihaeja jil naebue jeongaegi soryang balgyeondoen jeogeun myeoc beon isseossjiman neul yangi jeoggo, pihaeja jilaegirang dwiseoggyeossgi ddaemune jedaero pandogeul hal suga eobseossdan malya. banjang : ibeoneneun? coebagsa : pihaeja os hanguseoge twin jeongaegbanguleul cajanaen geoya. jeongaeg banguli mudeoissneun bubuneul oseseo oryeonaen jogagi binilbongji soge goseuranhi jarangseureobgirado han deus, hyeongsadeulege boyeojuneun coebagsa... coebagsa : i micinnomi sicee bogsunga jogageul neohgunaseo, maseuteobeisyoneul hangeora ddaraseo igeon baegpeuro hwagsilhan jeongaegiragu. amugeosdu an seoggyeosseo. yujeonja bunseog banjang : geureom i jeongaegeseo naon yujeonja jimunhago, baghaeili yujeonja jimunhago ilci hwaginman doemyeon....geim ggeutnanda igeoji ! wanbyeoghage ! igeon jeongmal bbaedo bagdo moshaneun muljeungiya. geunde urinaraneun ajig
doibi an doeeossgeodeun. yujeonja jimun bunseogeul hal suga eobseoyo.

taeyun : eoddeoghaeyo geureom? coebagsa : geuraeseo i jeongaeg saempeuleun ilbon gwahagsusayeongusoe bonaeya dwae. han myeocil ilbonseo yujeonja bunseogi ggeutnamyeon gyeolgwareul bonaejul ggeoya. ogiman gidulrimyeon doeneungeo ragu, algessnadeul?
myeocil pug swimyeonseo, ilbonseo pyeonji

gugdobyeon, caga gojangnassneunji dumani sidongeul geolgo issgo banjang, taeyun, yonggu deungi dwieseo joyongguneun waenji ansaegi anjohgo sigeunddameul heulrineun moseubida. geureona banjangeun gginggging careul milmyeonseodo moceoreom giune can mogsorida. banjang : ssibal ddongca...(taeyunbomyeo) jigeum baghaeili gamsi ceoljeohage buteoissji?
taeyun : ne..... gyodaero 24sigan gamsi jungibnida.

banjang : hayeoteun ibeonen seodureuda mangcimyeon andwae. baghaeil geu nom gamsiman jal hagu ilboneseo yujeonja gyeolgwaman nalraomyeon, muljeung meonjeo hwagbohan sangtaeeseo, ggeutnaebeorijagu. bureureu sidongi geolrimyeo apeuro naganeun ca..... hudadag dalryeoga cae olrataneun geureona joyongguneun darireul simhage jjeoldduggeorimyeo gansinhi apjarie olratanda. duman : neo dari wae geurae? byeongweon gabwasseo? yonggu : mweo ireon geolru byeongweonel ga, namjaga....... duman : eodibwa (bajireul hwig deulcweobonda) ........ eo! mose jjilrin gos bbun anira jongari geoyi daga corogbiceuro tungtung bueoissneun ggeumjjighan moseub. dumani bueun goseul tug geondeuryeoboja gotonge ilgeureojineun yonggu, ansaegmajeo jaesbicida. yonggu : gwanghohante jjilrin ge geuge... nogseun mosieossnabwayo...... mobsi jjajeungi nan noyisayi eolgul....ggojangggojang daejjoggateun seonggyeogi eolguleseodo neuggyeojinda.
yisa dwispyeoneuro, cimdaee nuun joyongguwa geureul dulreossan ganhosadeulyi moseubi boinda.

yisa :(beoreog hwanaemyeo) .....miryeonhan geosdo jeongdoga issji ! ige mweonya? duman : ani..... jeongmal darireul jjalraya doeneungeoyeyo? yisa : an geureom jyae jugeo ! nine pasangpung useubge bojima !

yisa : nogseun mose jjilryeosseumyeon geu jeugsi eunggeubceorireul jom hadeunga... ireon ceonhae miryeon ssanggomtaengi gateun saeggideul euigeu...... duman : ........geuraedu geureohji.... darireul....... yisa : geunama dahaengiya ! mureup miteseo jjareunigga ! neomuna eoiga eobseo yongguyi eolguleul meonghani deulyeoda boneun bagduman.... ganhosa : gajogiseyo? duman : jeo cinguga gajogi eobseoseo.......jega hyeongeun hyeonginde...... ganhosa : eojjaessdeun bohojasijyo ? yeogi susuldongyiseo ilgeobogo seomyeonghaseyo. naengraenghan toneuro malhamyeo seoryureul naemineun ganhosa, beolsseo susuljunbie deuleoganeunji goyeolgwa sigeun ddame hyibsseulryeo nuweoissneun joyonggu, hyimihan nunbiceuro dumanyi eolgulman gyesogbogo issda. yongguegeseo nuneul ddeji moshaneun duman, eoieobsneun nunbice jogeumssig mulgiga goinda.
meonghago cocwehan eolgulro yeop jari yongguyi caegsangeul mulggeureomi bogo issneun duman.

teong bieoissneun yongguyi jariga dodeurajyeo boinda. mulgiga geureonggeureonghan dumanyi nune..... yonggu caegsangmite deonggeumani nohyeoissneun weokeojjagi taeyun : yeoboseyo? ucegugijyo? ....ne, gyeongcalseobnida. .......geuraeyo? ....baegpeuro da cekeuhae bosingeojyo? byeogeul bogo anja darireul ddeolmyeo cojohage tonghwahaneun seotaeyun. sungan duman caegsangyi jeonhwabeli ulrinda. duman : yeoboseyo? .......(yaggan danghwanghan deus) eo....geurae.....jigeum ? jeo meolri gyeongcalseo geonmuli boineun deulpane udukeoni seoissneun dumangwa seolyeong. yeogwanbangi anin tag teuin deulpan wiyi du saram.... waenji saenggyeonghan neuggimeul junda. duman : mweoya ?(janddeug pigonhan pyojeongeuro) wenil inde? seolyeong : wae? nan jom bulreonaemyeon an dwae ?( eolgulbomyeo) jjeujjeu....ggeocilhaegajigu...babeun
duman : yosae uri bag teojineungeo molra ? jigeum ireol siganina issneunjul aleo? seolyeong : ......ci, jalnasseo...(jungeol) beomineun jabjidu moshamyeonseo.....

duman : neo maljosimhae !..... geureoneun neon, eonjeggaji geu yamaejusana jjilreugu danilggeoya? (gwaenhi heungbun) geu jishaeseo eolmana ddedon beolgessdagu. yabamggaji ijib jeojib deulraggeorigu. niga museun anmasaya? dabang rejiya ? seolyeong :(balggeun) mal dahaesseo? dumaneul noryeoboneun seolyeong, aggabuteo deulgo issdeon jongi syopingbaegeul dumanege hwig naeminda. seolyeong : ja..... igeona caenggyeo.
seolyeong : ....jeobeone ni os. pisjagug eobsaeneuragu jugneunjul alassda.

daeddeum dolaseoseo gabeorineun seolyeong. dumani jongibaeg sogeul bomyeo pisjagugi sarajin ggaeggeushan mianhan gibuni deuneunji, nanceohan pyojeongeul jisdaga seolyeongeul ddaragagi sijaghaneun duman. ddaraoneun dumanyi balsorireul deuleumyeo eolgule seuljjeog useumgiga gamdoneun seolyeong. dumani baro yeopeuro ddara butja hwananceog dasi eolguleul gudhimyeo deo bbalri geoleoganda. duman, deo isang andoegessda sipeunji apseoganeun seolyeongyi sonmogeul deobsseog jabeumyeo duman : ya, jamggan.... na jom bwa......
duman : nae eolgul jom boranigga......
mweonga eosaeghan bagdumanyi daesae useumi pus- nawabeorineun seolyeong. sonmogeul jabhin cae dumangwa
magsang majuseoja ssugseureobgo eosaeghan deus, soneul noheumyeo gwaenhi juwireul duribeon georineun duman. seolyeongeun dumanyi eolguleul bbanhi barabodaga.....
seolyeong : (dumanyi pal jabeumyeo) yeogi jom nuweo boranigga.......

(jangmyeon baggwimyeon) bulgeun jeonyeog haessaleul badeun cae, holro seoissneun mossaenggin namu. namue ringgelbyeong hanaga geolryeoissgo, namu araee gidaeanjeun bagdumanyi pale jusabaneuli neujgyeoul sseolreonghan deulpaneseo ringgeleul majneun hwangdanghan punggyeong... seolyeonggwa eoggaereul daego naranhi anja issneun dumaneun moceoreom pyeonanhan moseubida. geureona bulgeun jeonyeognoleul baraboneun dumanyi bogjabhan eolguleneun ddeolcil su eobsneun bulangami ggalryeoissda.
S# 92. byeongjeom gicayeog jubyeon

gyesog eodingareul eungsihago issneun taeyunyi cunghyeoldoen nun. ca soge anja yeosbogoissneun taeyunyi siseoneul ddaragamyeon..... jeo meolri suleul meogneun baghaeilyi moseubi boinda. byeongjeom gicayeog jubyeon... nalgeun suljibdeulgwa cikin jib, pojangmacadeungeul madahago guseogjin holro anja suleul meogneun baghaeilyi moseubeun isanghan bunwigireul pungginda. gageeseo naodeon dongne yeoin dumyeong, baghaeileul hilggeushilggeus cyeodabonda. geureoda haeilgwa nuni majucija hwadeuljjag pihaneun yeoindeul..... mweonga ssugdeogdaemyeo meoleojyeo
(sigani gyeonggwadoen deus) .......milryeooneun joleume jamsi nunggeopuli naeryeoon taeyun.

hwadeuljjag nuneul ddeumyeon, eoneusae suleul meogneun baghaeilyi moseubi boiji anhneunda. danghwanghayeo sabangeul dulreoboneun taeyun.... gil bandaepyeon beoseu jeonggeojang ape binil bongjireul deulgo bandeushage seoissneun haeileul balgyeonhanda. andohaneun taeyun.... jamsi hu beoseuga docaghaja olrataneun baghaeil. cae sidongeul geoneun taeyun. geureona geureureong- geureureong- soriman nal bbun, sidongi geolriji anhneunda. haeileul taeun beoseuneun meoleojyeo ganeunde, caneun gyesog sidongi geolriji anhgo.......

taeyun : jenjang ! (mujeongi kyeomyeo) ibwa....jigeum baghaeil jib jjoge jamboghan inweoni mweorago ? ......yeongyeoldoena jigeum ? bbalri ! taeyun :(jeonhwa ggeunheumyeo) banjangnim, jigeum baghaengili du siganjjae jibeuro an deuleoogo beoseu tandeseo geu nom jibggaji daseos jeonggeojang.... i nomi junggan eodiseonga naerin geobnida ! nuni beolgeohge cunghyeoldoen taeyuneun jarieseo ileoseon cae anjeolbujeol gonduseon moseubida. banjang : jinjeonghae. josa badda pulryeonan numi seolma mweon ileul jeojireugesseo? taeyun : geu nomeun uril yeosmeogigodo nameul nomiyeyo ! aecobuteo micin nomiragu ! banjang : joyonghi jom hae ! niga micin nom gatae ! banjang :(jinjeonghamyeo) ja, ja......jogeumman gidarijagu. swibge saenggaghae.
eocapi ilbonseo

yujeonja gyeolgwaman naomyeon, geu nyeoseogeun geugeolru ggeutnaneun geoya. taeyun :(jungeoldaedeus) naega geunyeoseogeul nohcidani..... naega..... aesseo jinjeongsikiryeoneun banjangyi noryeogedo aranggos eobsi, taeyuneun gyesog anjeolbujeol...pogbaljigjeonyi moseubida. banjang :(beoreog) geuman jom hae! naggaji bulanhajanha ! taeyun :..........yegami an johayo banjangnim........
S# 94. eubnae yaggug
jeonhyeongjeogin sigol yaggug.....yagsaga geonnejuneun ringgelbyeongeul bada gabange caenggyeoneohgo issneun yagsa : obamjunge eoneujibel ddo ga? wanjeon dondog olrassnabyeo....
seolyeong : (hansumswimyeo) geureoji mayo....bogyeongine eomma ilgassdawaseo ddo sseureojyeossde yagsa : euigeu...(useumyeo) bosabu pyocangeun eonje badeulggyeo ?
pigonhan eolgulijiman yagsaege ssig-hanbeon useojuneun seolyeong, gabangeul mego naganda. eodum sogeuro sarajyeo ganeun seolyeongyi dwismoseubi yaggug yuricangeul tonghae boinda.
S# 95. weonbari gogae bugeun.

nugungayi sijeom hwamyeon......eoduun solbat sairo geoleoganeun kamera... ganeun sumsoriwa hamgge supuleul josimseure hecineun geomeun sonyi moseubi jogeumssig boinda. ieuggo jobeun eondeoggili jal naeryeoda boineun jijeom. gulgjighan namudwie meomcweoseoneun geomeun cabunhage araejjog eondeoggileul eungsihaneun geomeun geurimja....baghaeilinji, animyeon dareun saraminji bunganhagi himdeulda. ieuggo....jobeun eondeoggilro jinaganeun han yeojayi geurimja....gwagseolyeongi boinda. salmyeosi seolyeongeul ddara umjigigi sijaghaneun geomeun geurimja. namusairo.....pulipsairo.......sorieobsi umjigineun cimcaghan balgeoleum. geomeun geurimjawa seolyeongyi georiga jogeumssig jogeumssig gaggaweojineunde sungan, seolyeong majeunpyeoneseo geoleooneun gyobogibeun yeojaai.....gimsohyeonida ! jeomjeom gaggaweojineun gwagseolyeonggwa gimsohyeoneul beongala baraboneun sijeomhwamyeon.... maci dul jung hanareul 'seontaeg'haryeoneun deus..... seucideus gyocahaneun seolyeonggwa sohyeon, yeongweonceoreom gilgeman neuggyeojineun sungan..... eoneudeos geomeun geurimjayi siseoni seoseohi sohyeonjjogeuro hyanghanda ! gabbunhan geoleumgeoliro gogaegileul geoleoganeun sohyeon. eodume hwibssain jubyeoneun joyonghagiman

byeolirado boneunji meonghage haneuleul olryeoda bomyeo geoleoganeun sohyeon, hayang ibgimeul sungan, calnagateun ingiceoge gogaereul dolryeoboneun sohyeon. sunsiggane dagaon geomeunsoni sohyeonyi mogeul gamgo ....ibeul magneunda.

soseuracideus nolramyeo momburim cyeoboneun sohyeon, gijeoggati geurimjayi songileul bburicineunde.... eoneusae ddaraon geurimjayi soni sohyeon deunge maen gabangggeuneul teog- butjabneunda. bimyeongeul cae jireugido jeone sohyeonyi ibeul teuleomagneun geomeun geurimja. geu sungan eoieobsgedo ae-aenghaneun ssairen soriga deulryeoogi sijaghanda. meolri seupikeoeseo deulryeooneun sori......deunghwagwanje hunryeon annae bangsongida.
sori : jigeumbuteo je 287ca minbangwi hunryeon, yagandeunghwagwanje hunryeon saengbangsongeul
jeonhaedeurigessseubnida. hyeonjae hunryeon gyeonggyegyeongbo balryeonggwa dongsie.....gag gajeonggwa sangga, gwangongseo deungeseoneun...
S# 96. eubnae eodinga.

nugunga jagi jibyi keoteneul dadneunda. ggamggamhaejineun hwamyeon. geu wiro gyesogdoeneun deunghwagwanje hunryeon bangsong sori......jigjig jjijeojineun seupikeo soriceoreom teojyeo naogo. sohyeonyi du sonmogeul dwieseo seutakingeuro ggongggong muggneun geurimjayi son.....neungsughago cimcaghan
sohyeonyi beodunggeorineun du darireul gateun seutakingeuro hande yeongyeolhayeo muggneunda.
du sonmoggwa du balmogi hanayi seutakingeuro muggyeojimyeo, jogeuman momi hwalceoreom dwiro hwieojinda.
S# 98. eubnae eodinga. ssairen sori gyesogdoego...nugunga bang anyi jeondeungeul ggeuryeoneun moseubi cangmun silrueseuro
tug ggeojineun bulbic. hwamyeoneun eodum soge jamginda. songwa baleul hande muggeun seutaking bubuneul jabgo maci gabangeul eoggaee medeusi, sohyeoneul dulreomen geomeun geurimja.
momi hwalceoreom dwiro hwin cae geurimjayi eoggaee maedalryeo supsogeuro....supsogeuro....meoleojyeo
ganeun sohyeon. meolri dwis moseubeuro boineun geomeun geurimjaneun baghaeil in geos gatgido hago, anin geos gatgido hada.
S# 100 eubnae eodinga
eubnaeyi eoneu geonmul, myeoc gaeyi cangmundeuli hana, dul, buli ggeojyeoganda. eodumsoge jamgineun eubnae. amheugeuro byeonhaeganda.
S# 101. supsog eondeogwi

muggin cae nubhyeojin sohyeon, deoldeol ddeolmyeonseodo keuge ddeun nundongjaga jogeumssig geurimjayi eolgul jjogeuro hyanghanda. geomeun geurimjaneun sohyeon yeope gamanhi anja joyonghi sohyeoneul barabogo issda ! gongpoe hwibssain sohyeonyi nundongjaga.....geomeun geurimjayi eolguleul barabonda. duleun jamsinama seoroyi eolguleul barabonda. geomeun geurimja, ieuggo seutakingeul sone jwideoni cabunhage sohyeonyi mogeuro dagaganda. dagcyeoon majimag sunganeul seuseurodo neuggineunji.....on himeul dahae beodunggeoryeoboneun sohyeonyi yangmalro jaegaleul mulrin ibeseo gansinhi tohaejyeo naoneun silnal gateun mogsori. sohyeon : (ulmeogideus).......a bba......... geureona amureon dongyoeobsi......cabunhage sohyeonyi mogeul joreugi sijaghaneun, agma gateun meolri boyeojineun eubnaeyi bulbicdeul. sohyeonyi mogsumi sageureo deul deus, bulbicdeuli hanassig eodum soge jamgyeo ganeun on ceonji.....jijigdaeneun minbangwi bangsonggwa rekwiemyi koreoseuga dwiseogginda.
S# 102. dong. sigangyeonggwa.

joyonghan sup sog. ssaneulhage sigeun sohyeonyi jageun mom wiro gyobogsangyiga deopyeojyeo issgo, geu yeope gamanhi anja issneun geomeun geurimja, mundeug sohyeonyi gabang sogeul dwijigi sijaghanda. piltongeul yeoleobodeoni geusogeseo monami bolpen hanareul ggeonaeneun son. yeope issdeon yeonpilggagi myeondokaldo salmyeosi ggeujibeo naenda. tug...tutug....ddeoleojigi sijaghaneun bisbangul. dosirag dduggeongeul yeoleoboneun ganeulgo hyin son......geu sogeseo sudgarag pokeureul ggeonaenda. mugeobge amjeondoeneun hwamyeon........bissoriman secage deulryeoonda.
S# 103. gateun jangso / daeumnal acim.

nugunga ulbujijneun sori. jjijeojineun deushan gohamsori, jioggateun ungseonggeorim...... ongaj sorideuli bulgyucighage dwiseoggineun gaunde.... mangyeonjasil seoissneun bagdumanyi eolgul wiro bismuli juljul heulreonaerigo issda. bisjulgi sogeseo dambaebuleul butiryeo gyesog seongnyangeul geueodaeneun duman. buleun gyesog butji anhgo dumanyi son ggeuteun gyesog ddeolrinda. geureon dumanyi ap dwiro ururu molryeoganeun gunceongsaeg ubiyi jeongyeongdeul...dalryeoganeun macimnae dambaebuleul butineun duman, ddeolrineun ibsulro dambaeyeongireul gipge deulimasinda.
geu wajungedo siseoneul gyesog hangundee gojeongdoeeo issneun duman....

bireul goseuranhi majeumyeo ddangbadage nuweoissneun sohyeonyi jogeumahan momddungireul bogo issda. misehage ddeolrineun dumanyi nunbici jeojjogeseo dagaoneun seotaeyunyi eolgulro hyanghanda. jamsi majuboneun dumangwa taeyun. seoro amureon mali eobsda. gamsigbandeuli sohyeonyi sace jubyeoneul bbaegbbaegi dulreossago gamsigeul sijaghago issda. bonneungceoreom teobeogteobeog sacejjogeuro dagaganeun seotaeyun. gamsigban1 :(cimcaghage) gaseume...myeondokalro geueun jasangi...jeonbu sibguhoe. geurigo... sohyeonyi geodeuleul beosgyeo naerineun deus, soneul umjigineun gamsigban 2. geodeuleul beosgyeo naerin sungan, sace jubyeonyi modeun saramdeul....ilsungan gogaereul oemyeonhanda. gosgoseseo teojyeonaoneun tansiggateun sineumsori. gamsigban 2 : ........eumbue monami bolpenhana......pokeuwa gati ggojhyeoisseum....... sohyeong nogeumgie sacesangtaereul giroghamyeo, jeunggeomuleul binilpaege jibeo neohneun gamsigban. jogeuman binil bongtue pimudeun sudgarag pokeuga ssug deuleoganda.
dareun goseuro gogaereul dolrineun duman.
heundeulrineun nunbic.... geuyi sijeomeuro boineun sageon hyeonjangeun jisange pyeolcyeojin saengjioggwa gatda.
ureureureu........jeongcereul al su eobsneun goengeumi gwisgae wingwinggeorineun gaunde.....

han cojja sungyeongeun sonamureul butjabgo himgyeobge gutoreul hagoissgo, sohyeonyi eommaneun jejihaneun sungyeonggwa silgaengireul beolimyeo piuleumeul tohago issgo. naemubu janggwangwa gyeongcal gowiganbu, jiyeoggu gughoeyiweonjjeumeuro boineun geomeun yangbogyi suhaengweondeuli badcyeojuneun usan arae neuleoseoseo dwisjimeul jin cae mweonga ssugdeogdaego issgo....
sohyeonyi jogeuman momddungi wiro bisbanguleul gyesog ddeoleojineunde......
